fields.author: Tonia | Feasting at Home
fields.description: This Lentil Soup recipe is infused with Indian spices- nourishing, comforting and healthy, it's vegan, and one of our favorites!
ingredients: 1 cup lentils  ( brown lentils, green lentils, red lentils, black lentils, French lentils ) See notes.
2 tablespoons olive oil, coconut oil or ghee
1 teaspoon whole cumin seeds, or ground cumin
1/2 cup pureed tomatoes  (or diced tomatoes or crushed tomatoes)
1 tablespoon garam masala ( use store-bought, make your own, or use curry powder)
½ -½  teaspoon cayenne, adjust to preference
4 cups broth- veggie broth or chicken stock
1/2 cup coconut milk,or cream (optional but makes it soft and balanced)
garnish with fresh cilantro or fresh parsley and a squeeze of lemon if you like.
fields.title: Best Lentil Soup Recipe

fields.description: A tasty bar perfect for snacking
ingredients: Pinch of salt + ¼ teaspoon salt (divided)
2 teaspoons instant espresso powder or instant coffee
fields.title: Oatmeal Fudge Bars

fields.author: James Martin
fields.description: For a show-stopping dinner party, James Martin recommends this peppery soup, topped with luxurious seafood
ingredients: 1 celeriac (about 1kg/2lb 4oz), peeled and cut into cubes
100g black pudding crumbled into small pieces
12 scallops coral removed, each halved into 2 discs
fields.title: Celeriac soup with scallops & black pudding

fields.author: Anna Glover
fields.description: Make this simple celery juice your own by adding green chilli for a bit of heat, turmeric, or a little maple syrup to sweeten, if you like
ingredients: 1 green apple (about 120g), peeled, quartered and cored
fields.title: Celery juice

fields.author: Good Food team
fields.description: This delicious, easy-to-make mushroom salad looks really impressive at dinner parties
ingredients: 100g parmesan (or vegetarian alternative), shaved or grated
fields.title: Cep, rocket & Parmesan salad

fields.description: This easy, old-fashioned eggnog recipe is made with cooked eggs, rum, whiskey, vanilla, sugar, and cream. The classic Christmas cocktail is a guaranteed hit at every holiday get-together!
ingredients: 1 teaspoon freshly grated nutmeg (plus more for garnish)
fields.title: Traditional Eggnog Recipe

fields.description: This Oatmeal-Raisin Snack Cake with Cream Cheese Frosting is wonderfully light and moist - a perfect casual dessert. It tastes like a big oatmeal-raisin cookie!
ingredients: ½ cup unsalted butter (at room temperature)
fields.title: Oatmeal-Raisin Snack Cake with Cream Cheese Frosting

fields.author: Miriam Nice
fields.description: If you love mojitos and champagne, this will be the cocktail of your dreams. Combine rum, mint, sugar syrup and bitters and top it up with champers
fields.title: Champagne mojito

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine
fields.description: 40 Make-Ahead VEGAN Salads- perfect for Sunday meal prep and midweek lunches or potlucks and gatherings: Favorite Lentil Salad
ingredients: 1 cup uncooked lentils- French lentils, black lentils, brown lentils (2 ½ cups cooked)
1 pint cherry tomatoes- or grape tomatoes, sliced in half, about 2 cups
1 English cucumber- or Turkish cucumber, diced, about 2 cups
1 bell pepper- yellow or red, diced
¼ cup red onion, very finely diced
¼- ½ cup fresh mint, chopped
2 garlic cloves, grated or finely minced
¼ cup extra virgin olive oil
fields.title: 40+ Vegan Salad Recipes That Last All Week

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine | Feasting at Home
fields.description: Tender Lebanese flatbread called manoushe is slathered with a mixture of zaatar spice and olive oil, a delicious appetizer or breakfast on the go. Vegan & gluten-free adaptable. Allow 2 hours rising time.
ingredients: 3 cups flour, spooned and leveled – bread flour, all-purpose flour (420 grams)
⅓ cup za’atar – a Middle Eastern spice blend with sesame seeds, thyme or marjoram, cumin, sumac.  Make homemade zaatar spice here.
½ cup extra virgin olive oil

nutrition.servingSize: One  6-7" round with zaatar and olive oil.

fields.title: Man'oushe Recipe

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine | Feasting at Home Blog
fields.description: Simple Marinated Fava beans- with olive oil, vinegar, garlic, lemon zest and fresh herbs- a delicisous way to serve fava beans!  Serve over toast or crostini, or as part of a cheese or mezze platter alongside olive, hummus and baba ganoush. So tasty!
ingredients: 1 cup shelled fava beans (1 ½ pounds in pods)
4 tablespoons red wine vinegar or white balsamic
2 medium garlic cloves, finely minced (about 2 teaspoons) or sub thinly sliced shallot
2-3 tablespoons fresh tender herbs- flat leaf parsley, dill, mint, tarragon, basil, cilantro or oregano
¾ teaspoon kosher salt ( per 1 cup of beans)
½ teaspoon whole spice seeds- optional ( coriander, mustard, caraway, cumin)
fields.title: Simple Marinated Fava Beans

fields.description: These poor man's cookies are an old family recipe - spiced bar cookies with plump raisins and chopped walnuts.
fields.title: Poor Man's Cookies

fields.author: Jennifer Irvine
fields.description: A superhealthy vegetable-packed curry with chickpeas, spinach and tomatoes. Serve this delicious Indian dish with filling brown basmati rice
ingredients: 1cm piece  ginger peeled and finely chopped or grated
½ red chilli deseeded and finely chopped
fields.title: Chana masala (chickpea curry) with spinach

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine | Feasting at Home
fields.description: A quick and healthy recipe for Mashed Sweet Potatoes - a flavorful vegan side dish that pairs well with fish, chicken or vegan mains. Silky and luscious, these flavorful sweet potatoes can be made in under 30 minutes! Top with maple pecans for a little crunch.
ingredients: 2 lbs yams (or sweet potatoes) sliced into ½ inch thick disks, skin on or peel them first. About 4 medium yams.
2 tablespoons coconut oil, butter, vegan butter,  ghee, or olive oil, more for serving
optional 1-2 teaspoons fresh ginger, grated or use a paste
fields.title: Mashed Sweet Potatoes

fields.author: Tonia | Feasting at Home
fields.description: This Thai massaman curry recipe is easy to make and full of rich, warm, mellow flavor. Make it with your choice of chicken or tofu and potatoes in a lovely spiced curry sauce.
ingredients: 1 1/2 pounds Yukon gold potatoes (about 4 medium) or other thin-skinned (red potatoes) cut into 1 ½ -inch chunks.
1 medium shallot, cut into thin slices
2-6 tablespoons red curry paste, to heat preference (we used 4 tablespoons of Maesri brand for a medium spice)
2 cans of full-fat coconut milk, 27 ounces
1-2 tablespoons tamarind puree or paste *see notes
1 1/2 pounds chicken- breast, sliced into very thin strips (can also use chicken thighs- *see notes, shrimp or crispy tofu)
fields.title: Massaman Curry Thai

fields.description: This Orange-Chocolate Chip Cake is a wonderfully moist buttermilk cake spiked with tons of orange flavor and loads of mini chocolate chips.
ingredients: 6 tablespoons unsalted butter, at room temperature
¾ cup + 1 tablespoon light brown sugar
fields.title: Orange-Chocolate Chip Snack Cake

fields.author: Ravinder Bhogal
fields.description: Serve up a hearty Indian veggie chickpea curry served with fried bread. The addition of spices such as black cardamom impart an irresistible smoky note
ingredients: 400g self-raising flour plus extra for dusting
small bunch fresh fenugreek or coriander, finely chopped
2 tsp black loose-leaf tea brewed in 1 litre hot water
2 x 400g cans chickpeas drained and rinsed
thumb-sized piece ginger peeled and grated
½ tsp coarsely ground  black pepper
sliced red onion and yogurt, to serve
½ small bunch of coriander leaves picked, plus extra to serve
fields.title: Channa bhatura

fields.description: An easy orange frozen yogurt recipe that tastes just like an orange creamsicle!
fields.title: Orange Frozen Yogurt

fields.author: Cassie Best
fields.description: We've combined sausage rolls with the flavours of Chinese char siu pork - doubly delicious!
ingredients: 125g slightly salted butter wrapped in foil and chilled
1 tbsp black and white sesame seeds
fields.title: Char siu style sausage puffs

fields.author: Tonia Schemmel | Feasting at Home
fields.description: This one-pan chickpea quinoa dinner is full of vibrant Greek flavor. Packed with protein, fiber, fresh tomatoes, and briny olives, topped with crumbled feta for a creamy finish. Made in one pan, on the stovetop, with just 15 minutes of hands-on time. Perfect for weeknights!
ingredients: pinch of red pepper flakes (or to taste)
2 x 14-ounce cans of chickpeas, drained  (3 cups)
1/2 teaspoon salt (more to taste, depending on broth and chickpeas)
1 cup fresh cherry tomatoes, more for garnish, cut into bite-sized pieces
1/2 cup kalamata olives,  or castelvetrano olives (a mixture is nice!), cut in half or rounds
fields.title: Chickpea Quinoa Skillet Dinner

fields.description: This is, hands down, THE BEST, Oreo cheesecake you'll ever make! A smooth and creamy cheesecake loaded with chunks of Oreo cookies.
ingredients: 24  Oreo cookies (whole cookie, filling included, crushed into fine crumbs)
fields.title: Oreo Cheesecake (No Water Bath!)

fields.description: These oven-fried onion rings are less mess than the deep-fried version, but just as crunchy and delicious!
ingredients: ½ cup buttermilk, at room temperature
2  large yellow onions (cut into ½-inch rings, discarding any less than 2 inches in diameter)
fields.title: Oven-Fried Onion Rings

fields.author: Rosie Birkett
fields.description: Serve this pie for family or friends and it will go down a storm. Ricotta, feta, chard and preserved lemon are presented in a beautiful filo pastry parcel
ingredients: 1 green chilli deseeded and finely chopped
2 slices preserved lemon pith and flesh removed and finely sliced
100g bunch of parsley chervil or any fresh green herb of your choice, roughly chopped
fields.title: Chard, lemon & cheese pie

fields.author: Good Food team
fields.description: Flavour basic grains with sundried tomatoes, aubergines, red peppers and olives for a versatile side dish
ingredients: 4 baby aubergines each sliced lengthways into 3
1 red pepper sliced lengthways into 1cm pieces
fields.title: Charred aubergine, pepper & bulgur salad

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine
fields.description: Slow-Baked Moroccan Eggplant with Ras el Hanout, caramelized garlic, shallots and tomatoes. A rustic side dish that can be turned into a hearty vegetarian main.  Serve with Basmati Rice or homemade Pita, and Tzatziki Sauce. (This makes a big batch, feel free to cut in half.)
ingredients: 2 pounds eggplant- Japanese, Chinese or fairytale
2 teaspoons ras el hanout or Villa Jerada Ras El Hanout
1 teaspoon caraway seeds (or sub fennel seeds)
4 medium tomatoes (or 1 lb cherry tomatoes), quartered
large lemon zest pieces, from one lemon (use a veggie peeler or sharp knife)
fields.title: Meltingly Tender Moroccan Eggplant

fields.description: Enjoy a relaxing, ad-free experience at Feasting at Home for only $49 a year! No more pesky ads to interupt your scrolling.
fields.title: Membership

fields.description: A cold oatmeal chilled overnight in the refrigerator - perfect for summer breakfasts!
fields.title: Overnight Chilled Plum-Oatmeal Pudding

fields.author: Anna Glover
fields.description: Make this quick broccoli, lemon and walnut pasta with simple storecupboard ingredients. It’s healthy, low in fat and calories and full of texture and flavour
ingredients: 1 head  broccoli cut into small florets and stalk cut into small pieces
fields.title: Charred broccoli, lemon & walnut pasta

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine | Feasting at Home Blog
fields.description: A simple vegan recipe for Brussels Sprout Salad with cilantro and lime that can be made ahead, and has a multitude of uses! Serve this over brown rice or quinoa for a healthy vegan bowl, or use as a slaw for tacos or serve as a tasty side for grilled mains—perfect side dish for potlucks and gatherings.
ingredients: 4 scallions- chopped ( or ¼ cup red onion, finely sliced)
2 garlic cloves, grated or finely minced
1 cup chopped cilantro ( small stems ok)
2 limes ( use zest of both limes and ¼ cup lime juice)
½ teaspoon salt, more to taste
fields.title: Brussels Sprout Salad with Cilantro and Lime

fields.description: Three layers of pavlova with fresh whipped cream and a trio of mixed berries in between.
fields.title: Pavlova Layer Cake with Whipped Cream & Berries

fields.author: Ailsa Burt
fields.description: Reimagine veggie skewers with these charred spring cabbage versions served with a moreish harissa butter, Greek yogurt and crispy onions
ingredients: small handful of parsley finely chopped
fields.title: Charred cabbage skewers with harissa butter

fields.author: Tonia Schemmel | Feasting at Home
fields.description: One-pan Mexican chicken and rice with black beans is a hearty, flavorful dinner made with spice-rubbed chicken thighs—ready in under an hour.
ingredients: 1 bunch cilantro, reserve sprigs for garnishing, chop the rest, including the tender stems
1 jalapeno, rough chop- seeds removed if desired- add less for less spice
2 x 14-ounce cans of black beans, drained (3 cups, cooked with salt)
1 1/2 cups long-grain white rice, like basmati
fields.title: Mexican Chicken and Rice with Black Beans

fields.author: Melissa Thompson – Journalist and food writer
fields.description: Rustle up this fresh, summery salad made with charred sweetcorn, red onion, feta, parsley and chives. It makes an excellent side dish for al fresco dining
ingredients: 400g sweetcorn (or 2-3 corn cobs, kernels stripped off)
drizzle of rapeseed oil (or another neutral oil), for frying
200g feta broken into chunks (ensure vegetarian, if needed)
fields.title: Charred corn & feta salad

fields.description: A delicious fruit crumble
ingredients: 2 pounds fresh peaches (peeled, pitted and cut into wedges ½-inch to ¾-inch-thick)
6 tablespoons unsalted butter (at room temperature, cut into pieces)
fields.title: Peach and Blueberry Crumble

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine | Feasting at Home
fields.description: This flavorful Middle Eastern rice is easy and delicious! Made with basmati rice topped with caramelized shallots, zaatar spice, lemon zest, optional pine nuts, and fresh herbs in under 30 minutes!
ingredients: 2 cups white basmati rice, rinsed and drained well (see notes for brown basmati rice)
2-4 tablespoons pine nuts or use slivered almonds
1 tablespoon zaatar, sprinkle more on as desired
Garnish: fresh herbs like dill, Italian parsley, or mint, and black pepper
fields.title: Middle Eastern Rice Recipe

fields.author: John Torode
fields.description: The flavours of the fish work well with the crunch of the aniseedy fennel salad
ingredients: 3 tbsp extra-virgin olive oil plus extra to serve
600g piece salmon fillet, skin on and scaled (ask your fishmonger to do this)
2 x 20g packs flat-leaf parsley leaves roughly chopped
fields.title: Charred salmon with fennel & olive salad

fields.description: This classic peach cobbler recipe is incredibly easy to make from scratch, using fresh peaches and a blend of sugar and spices, and a rustic biscuit dough on top, baked until browned and bubbling. Truly the BEST!
ingredients: 6  peaches (peeled, pitted & sliced into ¼- to ½-inch slices (about 6 cups))
4 tablespoons instant tapioca (ground in a spice grinder)
½ cup unsalted butter, cold and cut into small pieces
fields.title: Peach Cobbler Recipe

fields.author: Esther Clark
fields.description: Cook this beetroot biriyani and freeze the leftovers for busy weeknights. With colourful beetroot taking centre stage, it's full of spices and is a flavourful dish
ingredients: 3 large (500g unprepped), raw  beetroot peeled and cut into 2cm cubes
your favourite chutney or pickle, to serve (optional)
fields.title: Cheat’s beetroot biriyani

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine | Feasting at Home Blog
fields.description: An energizing, spicy Mexican Green smoothie with citrus, pineapple, cucumber, cilantro avocado and jalapeño. VEGAN! Refreshing, energizing and invigorating!
ingredients: ¼ cup – ½ cup fresh cilantro – small stems ok
1-3 slices jalapeno ( or more to taste)
fields.title: Mexican Green Smoothie

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine | Feasting at Home Blog
fields.description: A delicious "healthier" recipe for Mezcal Margaritas- with smoky mezcal, fresh citrus,  jalapeno, cilantro....smoky, spicy, and oh so refreshing! Designed for the "grown-up" palate. If you like Scotch, you'll love this.
ingredients: 2 ounces lime juice (or sub part other citrus- orange, mandarin or grapefruit)
1 ½ ounces Orange Liqueur ( Ciontreau, Grand Marnier or Triple Sec
2-3 teaspoons  agave, Honey Simple Syrup or maple syrup
fields.title: Mezcal Margarita

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine | Feasting at Home Blog
fields.description: A Middle Eastern Eggplant Wrap- with roasted eggplant, shredded a kale, parsley and mint slaw, with radishes, tomatoes, onion and tahini sauce ( or sub baba ganoush!).
ingredients: 6-7 lacinato ( or tuscan) kale leaves – 2 cups shredded ( packed)
optional additions- sliced tomato, radishes, cucumber, feta, yogurt
2- 4 wraps or tortillas ( feel free to use gluten free) 8-10 inch
fields.title: Middle Eastern Eggplant Wrap

fields.description: This is a classic, old-fashioned peanut brittle recipe that is both quick and easy - no candy thermometer required. Great for Christmas gifts or adding some pizzazz to those cookie trays!
fields.title: Peanut Brittle Recipe

fields.author: Elena Silcock
fields.description: If you're eating gluten-free or dairy-free, try this delicious dhal topped with spicy cauliflower as a filling dinner or as a smaller side dish
ingredients: 1 small cauliflower cut into small florets (retain the leaves)
1 red chilli (deseeded if you don't like it too hot), finely chopped
small pack coriander stalks chopped, leaves picked to serve
2 limes 1 juiced, 1 cut into wedges to serve
fields.title: Cheat’s black dhal

fields.description: Sink your teeth into an amazingly moist slice of this decadent peanut butter banana bread with chocolate chips!
fields.title: Peanut Butter Banana Bread

fields.author: Chelsie Collins
fields.description: This speedy version of the classic Japanese noodle soup makes a delicious everyday dinner or warming lunch - and it's low in fat and calories too
ingredients: small pack coriander stalks and leaves separated
1 red chilli (deseeded if you don’t like it too hot), sliced
fields.title: Cheat’s chicken ramen

fields.description: Easy and healthy granola bars loaded with peanut butter, peanuts and miniature chocolate chips.
fields.title: Chewy Peanut Butter-Chocolate Chip Granola Bars

fields.author: Sophie Godwin – Cookery writer
fields.description: The easy roast turkey is cooked high and fast like a chicken, giving it extra crispy skin. It needs longer to rest so the meat can relax and stay succulent
ingredients: 3 rosemary sprigs, leaves picked and finely chopped
1 turkey (around 4kg, but not more), giblets removed
2large banana shallots unpeeled, cut in half lengthways
fields.title: Christmas turkey

fields.description: This classic recipe for peanut butter cookies comes straight from my mom's recipe box, and they are the BEST peanut butter cookies. They are easy to make and stay wonderfully soft.
fields.title: Easy Peanut Butter Cookies

fields.author: Ailsa Burt
fields.description: Make the most of nectarine season with this comforting cobbler that uses scones for a quick and easy topping, meaning it can be on the table in an hour
ingredients: clotted cream or vanilla ice cream to serve
fields.title: Cheat's nectarine cobbler

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine | Feasting at Home
fields.description: This classic minestrone soup recipe is so comforting! Packed with nourishing veggies, beans, and bright herbs, it is a delicious and easy vegetarian one-pot meal that can be made in 30 minutes. Vegan-adaptable.
ingredients: ½ teaspoon red pepper flakes (Aleppo is nice here)
1 fennel bulb, cored and chopped (1 ½ cups, or sub chopped celery)
2 cups carrots, chopped, peeled, ¼ inch thick disks, cut into halves or quarters
4 cups veggie broth or chicken broth
1 cup dry small pasta (like ditalini pasta, mini shells or gluten-free pasta) see notes
2 cups lacinato kale ( big stems removed), chopped into 1-inch pieces
½ cup flat leaf parsley, chopped-  save half for garnish (or sub fresh basil)
Optional: 1-2 teaspoons soy sauce (or GF liquid aminos), add to taste, for extra depth.
Black pepper and Aleppo chili flakes to taste
fields.title: Minestrone Soup Recipe

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine
fields.description: Middle Eastern Salad Tacos with spiced chickpeas, hummus and a mound of lemony salad, topped with fresh herbs and scallions. Vegan & sooooo Delicious!
ingredients: 1 can chick peas, rinsed and drained
1 teaspoon sumac ( optional – leave out or use za’atar- see notes )
giant handful arugula ( or other greens)
¼ teaspoon salt, more to taste
fields.title: Middle Eastern Salad Tacos

fields.description: A rich, creamy peanut butter ice cream is spiked with peanut butter swirls.
ingredients: ½ cup creamy peanut butter (melted and cooled slightly)
fields.title: Peanut Butter Lover's Ice Cream

fields.author: John Torode
fields.description: The simplest ideas are often the best, as this clever ice from MasterChef judge John Torode demonstrates
fields.title: Cheat's pistachio ice cream

fields.author: Tonia | Feasting at Home
fields.description: This baked Miso Eggplant is roasted in the oven until tender and succulent, brushed with a flavorful miso glaze, and broiled for delicious caramelization. A tasty vegan dinner or side dish. Video.
ingredients: 2 medium globe eggplants (or several Japanese eggplants)
2 tablespoons mirin (substitute rice vinegar + 1/2 teaspoon more of sweetener)
fields.title: Miso Eggplant Recipe (Nasu Dengaku)

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine | Feasting at Home Blog
fields.description: Lentil Buddha Bowls with fresh seasonal veggies, greens, microgreens, nuts, avocado, fresh herbs and our everyday tahini sauce!  Vegan and GF.
ingredients: ¼ teaspoon Aleppo chili flakes (or red pepper flakes)
¼ -⅓  cup water, more to desired consistency.
1-2 tablespoons olive oil (optional, feel free to leave it out if you prefer oil-free)
2 fresh garlic cloves (finely minced – grate it or use a garlic press)

2 cups dark leafy greens (organic spinach, arugula, kale) Tip: If using lacinato kale, shred it and massage it with a little olive oil and a pinch of salt to tenderize it before adding it to the bowl.
2 cups cauliflower florets, roasted or raw
2 cups shredded carrots, cabbage or beets (or a mix)
1 bell pepper- thinly sliced, optional, or sub cucumber
¼ cup nuts or seeds; pumpkin seeds, sunflower seeds, almonds, pinenuts, etc.
fresh herbs or microgreens- cilantro, flat leaf parsley, mint or dill
fields.title: Lentil Bowl Recipe

fields.author: Tonia | Feasting at Home
fields.description: Thes Miso Salmon Bowls are clean and simple with savory Asian flavors. Salmon bites with roasted shiitakes, edamame, avocado, and red cabbage drizzled with a delicious miso dressing. Vegan and gluten-free adaptable.
ingredients: 1 pound salmon fillets, fully thawed- choose fillets that are even in thickness. (Skin off or peel off after cooked) Or sub tofu.
3-4 cups cooked rice (brown rice, jasmine rice, black rice, or other cooked grain, or cooked cauliflower rice)
2 cups edamame, shelled and thawed (or sub cucumber)
2 cups red cabbage, shredded (see notes if you prefer cooked cabbage)
Optional Garnishes: sesame seeds, cilantro, scallions, microgreens, Chili Crisp or Peanut Chili Crunch
2 tablespoons soy sauce or Braggs Liquid Aminos

nutrition.servingSize: one bowl- including 1/2 cup rice and miso dressing

fields.title: Miso Salmon Bowl

fields.author: Barney Desmazery
fields.description: Don't be daunted by making a sourdough bread starter at home - this easy cheat's version makes a lovely loaf without the stress
fields.title: Easy sourdough bread

fields.description: Peanut butter-pretzel truffles created as an homage to my favorite ice cream, Chubby Hubby, by Ben & Jerry's.
ingredients: 1 cup milk or semisweet chocolate chips
fields.title: Peanut Butter-Pretzel Truffles

fields.description: These bars are a fabulous peanut butter and popcorn spin on traditional crispy rice treats!
ingredients: ¾ cup Peter Pan Simply Ground peanut butter
fields.title: Peanut Butter & Marshmallow Popcorn Bars

fields.author: Helena Busiakiewicz
fields.description: Take your garlic bread to the next level with this pull-apart loaf packed with melted cheese and gently spiced with harissa.
ingredients: 500g loaf of white bread (a sourdough boule works well)
2-3 tbsp harissa (depending on how spicy you like it)
fields.title: Cheddar & harissa garlic bread

fields.author: Tonia | Feasting at Home
fields.description: A delicious vegan recipe for Miso Tofu Wrap with Roasted Winter Squash, Baked Miso Tofu, Asian Slaw, Avocado, Furikake and flavorful Miso Dressing.
ingredients: 2 green onions, chopped, save out 1 tablespoon for slaw
1 pound winter squash, sliced into 1/2 inch thick strips (delicata, red kuri, butternut- see notes)
2-3 leaves of napa cabbage, about 1 1/2 cups after chopped
tortillas (try cassava, rice or sprouted wheat)
fields.title: Miso Tofu Wrap with Winter Squash and Furikake

fields.description: Delicious and easy peanut butter cookies
ingredients: 2 cups all-purpose flour (plus more for dusting)
¾ cup unsalted butter (at room temperature)
fields.title: Peanut Butter Sandwich Cookies

fields.author: Tonia Schemmel | Feasting at Home
fields.description: This cauliflower couscous recipe is gluten-free, healthy and vibrantly flavorful! Cauliflower stands in for couscous here with dried apricots, toasted almonds and Moroccan spices, tossed with fresh parsley, mint and a lemon honey drizzle.  Vegan-adaptable.
ingredients: 1 head cauliflower, about 1 1/4 pounds or 5 cups riced
juice and zest of a lemon
2 tablespoons honey (or brown rice syrup, maple syrup, yacon root syrup)
1/4 cup almonds, toasted (slivered, sliced or whole chopped)
fields.title: Cauliflower Couscous Recipe

fields.author: Jane Hornby
fields.description: Savoury scones make a great meal with a bowl of soup, or a tasty addition to afternoon tea
ingredients: 2 large sweetcorn cobs (or 250g sweetcorn kernels from a can, drained weight)
¼ tsp ground cayenne or paprika plus extra for sprinkling
50g cold unsalted butter cut into cubes
175ml semi-skimmed milk plus extra for brushing
fields.title: Cheddar & sweetcorn scones

fields.description: Sweet, buttery, and perfectly nutty this easy pecan pie recipe makes the ultimate holiday dessert.
ingredients: 6 tablespoons cold unsalted butter (cut into ¼-inch slices)
¼  cup chilled solid vegetable shortening (cut into 2 pieces)
2 cups pecans (toasted and chopped into small pieces)
fields.title: Pecan Pie

fields.author: John Bourne
fields.description: Enjoy this leek and potato pie as a side or main meal. Be sure to use the best Cheshire cheese you can find – the better the cheese, the better the dish
ingredients: 3  medium potatoes (about 450g), peeled and thinly sliced
350g Cheshire cheese (we used HS Bourne), grated
fields.title: Cheeky pie

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine
fields.description: This Moroccan Red Lentil Quinoa Soup is made with simple ingredients, easy to make and full of delicious flavor! Make this in an Instant Pot or stove top.
ingredients: 3 carrots, diced (2 cups) ( or sub other root veggies- yam or sweet potato, parsnips, celery root, sunchokes)
1 poblano pepper, diced (optional, for a subtle heat)
one 14-ounce can diced tomatoes (or sub 1 1/2 cups diced tomatoes with juices)
1 teaspoon dried thyme (or add a few bay leaves)
fields.title: Moroccan Red Lentil Quinoa Soup

fields.author: Jane Hornby
fields.description: These moreish, easy-to-make wraps are perfect for a casual party
ingredients: small handful jalapeño peppers drained and finely chopped
classic tomato salsa, to serve (see tip below)
fields.title: Cheese & jalapeno bites with salsa & mojitos

fields.description: Delicious nut cookies
ingredients: ½ cup unsalted butter, at room temperature ((4 ounces ))
fields.title: Pecan Sandies

fields.author: Good Food team
fields.description: The cheese straw is a versatile favourite. Add mustard and cayenne to give this entertaining staple a little kick
fields.title: Cheese & mustard straws

fields.description: Hamburger buns topped with spaghetti sauce, mozzarella and pepperoni - one of my grandma's specialties!
ingredients: Spaghetti sauce (homemade or your favorite jarred)
Pepperoni or any other toppings of your choice
fields.title: Pizza Burgers

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine
fields.description: The BEST Lentil Salad infused with Moroccan Spices, this healthy vegan lentil salad can be made ahead and keeps for 4 days, perfect for healthy midweek lunches!
ingredients: 4 cups cooked lentils (try to use whole black lentils, brown lentils, green lentils-  split lentils can easily overcook and turn to mush)
1/4 cup almonds, chopped or slivered, toasted
1 cup cilantro or flat-leaf parsley (or use part mint, or a blend of all three, chopped
zest and juice of one orange
1/4 cup red wine vinegar, or sub sherry vinegar, or apple cider vinegar
2 garlic cloves, finely minced (use a garlic press)
pinch or two chili flakes (optional, but good)
fields.title: Moroccan Lentil Salad Recipe

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine | Feasting at Home
fields.description: This recipe for Mushroom Dusted Halibut is bursting with umami flavor. The fish is coated in Mushroom Powder before pan-searing in a skillet, then topped with sautéed mushrooms and a truffle vinaigrette.
ingredients: 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder or onion powder
2 teaspoons soy sauce (or use Braggs GF Liquid Aminos)
8 ounces fresh mushrooms- chanterelles, oysters, maitake, shiitake etc.
2 teaspoons Champagne Vinegar, red wine vinegar or sherry vinegar ( a light-tasting vinegar works well here – do not use white vinegar.)
1 lb halibut, black cod, sea bass, cod,  salmon, or scallops.
1 lb Jerusalem artichokes ( see notes), scrubbed & halved
1 lb thin-skinned potatoes, halved or quarteed

nutrition.servingSize: 4 ounce halibut (does not include sides- just fish, sautéed mushrooms &vinaigrette)

fields.title: Mushroom Dusted Halibut

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine | Feasting at Home Blog
fields.description: A delicious vegan Moroccan Salad with blood oranges, quinoa, almonds, olives, mint and a tangy, bright blood orange dressing. Perfect for the holiday table, this salad is festive and healthy!
ingredients: ¼ cup thinly sliced kalamata olives
cracked pepper and salt to taste
¼ cup toasted slivered or Marcona almonds
fields.title: Moroccan Salad with Quinoa

fields.author: Amanda Nicolas
fields.description: Tuck into this simple, comforting vegetarian pie with a classic cheese and onion filling. Eat it warm with your favourite veg sides, or serve cold for a picnic
fields.title: Easy cheese & onion pie

fields.description: This easy pizza dip recipe features layers of mozzarella and Parmesan cheeses, pizza sauce, and your favorite pizza toppings. Always a hit!
fields.title: Pizza Dip

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine | Feasting at Home
fields.description: This Moroccan Rice recipe is a delicious, wholesome side dish for any occasion! Made with savory Moroccan spices, almonds, dried fruit, and orange zest.
ingredients: 2 cups basmati rice ( brown or white, see notes!)
½-¾ cup raisins, currants, or dried apricots (chopped)
2 cinnamon sticks ( or sub ½ teaspoon ground cinnamon)
3 ½ cups water or broth (see notes!)
fields.title: Moroccan Rice

fields.description: My grandma's easy and delicious pizzelle recipe for the classic Italian cookie. Lightly sweetened and flavored with vanilla and whiskey (with options for anise and other flavors), they are wonderfully crisp and buttery, and perfect for holiday gift-giving!
fields.title: Grandma's Pizzelle Recipe

fields.author: Good Food team
fields.description: Enjoy British pork with melted Cheshire cheese and a kick of English mustard
ingredients: 4 tbsp caramelised onions from a jar
fields.title: Cheese & onion pork chops

fields.author: Good Food team
fields.description: Didn't think you could manage a soufflé? Try this simple step-by-step recipe and conquer a classic
ingredients: 100g grated extra-strong cheddar (blue cheese, goat's cheese and smoked cheeses also work well)
fields.recipeCategory: Brunch, Dinner, Lunch, Main course, Side dish, Starter, Supper
fields.title: Cheese soufflé in 4 easy steps

fields.description: A great recipe for a traditional pot roast
ingredients: 2 pounds boneless chuck roast, trimmed and cut in half
0.35 ounces dried morels or dried shiitake mushrooms
3 tablespoons sun-dried tomato paste or regular tomato paste
fields.title: Company Pot Roast

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine | Feasting at Home
fields.description: Truly the best mushroom gravy recipe! Full of flavor, depth and complexity without any pan drippings. Vegan-adaptable.
ingredients: 2 cups mushroom broth,  veggie broth or stock (or feel free to use beef or chicken stock) see notes.
1 tablespoon miso paste (see notes for substitution)
3 tablespoons butter (or olive oil, or vegan butter!)
12 ounces mushrooms, sliced (creminis, shiitakes, portobellos, morels) about 3-4 cups
1 shallot, finely diced (or half an onion)
1 tablespoon fresh thyme leaves (optional, or rosemary, or sub 1 teaspoon dried)
3 tablespoons AP flour or GF flour
fields.title: Mushroom Gravy

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine | Feasting at Home
fields.description: This Jerusalem Artichoke soup recipe is completely divine! Made with sunchokes, mushrooms, and potatoes, it's luxurious and decadent yet very simple to make, perfect for entertaining! Vegan and gluten-free.
ingredients: 8 ounces fresh mushrooms, sliced (cremini, shiitake, morels, chanterelles, button)
1 tablespoon fresh thyme (or sage or rosemary)
1/2 pound potatoes (Yukon or white), thinly sliced
1/2 cup dried mushrooms (like shiitake or morels) or sub 1 cup more fresh mushrooms
1/2 teaspoon soy sauce (or Braggs Liquid Aminos)
fields.title: Jerusalem Artichoke Soup Recipe  (Sunchoke soup)

fields.author: Good Food team
fields.description: These tasty pastries are great for a main meal and an even better snack. They can be made ahead and frozen
ingredients: 1 tsp olive oil or sunflower oil
fields.recipeCategory: Buffet, Dinner, Main course, Side dish, Snack, Supper
fields.title: Cheese & thyme wrapped mushrooms

fields.description: A tasty and classic appetizer
ingredients: 6  russet potatoes (small to medium-sized is best)
fields.title: Potato Skins

fields.author: Good Food team
fields.description: Add a Mediterranean twist to your Sunday lunch - serve these alongside roast chicken or lamb, or with salad as a light veggie lunch
ingredients: half a ball light mozzarella roughly chopped
50g roasted red pepper from a jar, drained and roughly chopped
fields.title: Cheesy baked onions

fields.description: Gooey Pumpkin Blondies loaded with butterscotch chips, white chocolate and pecans.
ingredients: 1 cup unsalted butter (melted and cooled to room temperature)
15 ounces canned pure pumpkin puree (about 2 cups)
fields.title: Pumpkin Blondies

fields.author: Sara Buenfeld
fields.description: Give baked potatoes a bit of oomph with this easily reheated side dish - great with sausages and salad
ingredients: 175g mature cheddar grated, plus 85g for sprinkling
fields.title: Cheesy bean potatoes

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine | Feasting at Home
fields.description: Mushroom Wellington with Rosemary and Pecans - a simple, tasty vegan main dish that can be made ahead, perfect for holiday gatherings!  Serve with optional Port Wine Sauce. *Make sure to thaw your puff pastry before you start (overnight in the fridge is easiest!) Makes 2 rolls.
ingredients: 1 box -2 sheets vegan puff pastry, thawed in the fridge overnight. (Use cold-not at room temp) See notes.
2 pounds mushrooms (total): cremini, king oyster, shiitakes, portobello, wild mushrooms or use a mix.
1 tablespoon chopped fresh rosemary (or sage, or thyme)
1/4 cup sherry wine (not sherry vinegar), marsala wine, ruby port (or red wine or white wine) – or leave it out! See notes.
1 cup chopped, toasted pecans ( or feel free to sub hazelnuts or walnuts)
Optional: if you want to add cheese, add ½ – 1 cup grated pecorino, gruyere, goat cheese or cream cheese- or use a meltable vegan cheese- or make vegan ricotta!  Mix it with the mushroom filling.
“Egg” wash: use nut milk, cream or melted coconut oil to brush on the pastry.  If not worried about it being vegan, whisk an egg with a tablespoon of water.
Optional: Serve with Port Sauce (see notes)
fields.title: Vegan Mushroom Wellington with Rosemary and Pecans

fields.author: Tonia | Feasting at Home
fields.description: Bright and tangy, this Mustard Seed Maple Dressing is the perfect compliment to roasted or grilled veggies and hearty salads.  Easy and quick to make and Vegan!
fields.title: Mustard Maple Dressing

fields.description: Fluffy spiced pumpkin muffins are filled with a cream cheese center and topped with pecan streusel.
ingredients: 4 ounces cream cheese (softened to room temperature)
fields.title: Pumpkin and Cream Cheese Muffins with Pecan Streusel

fields.author: Good Food team
fields.description: This creamy broccoli pasta is a speedy, satisfying and affordable meal which you can make in just 30 minutes. Use the grill instead of the oven to save time
fields.title: Cheesy broccoli pasta bake

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine | Feasting at Home
fields.description: Quick EASY Naan Recipe- a simple step-by-step guide to making authentic Indian style, pillowy naan bread in a skillet with all your favorite variations- garlic naan, onion naan and seeded naan!
ingredients: 2 cups all-purpose flour or bread flour (see notes)
1 teaspoon instant yeast  (see notes for Active Dry Yeast)
¼ cup plain yogurt (or sub vegan yogurt)
½-1 teaspoon whole seeds: nigella, cumin, fennel, caraway, anise, or sesame seeds- or a combo
finely chopped garlic ( 2 tablespoons)  or finely chopped onion or shallot (2 tablespoons)
fields.title: Homemade Naan

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine
fields.description: Vegan Nachos! These loaded vegan nachos are made with flavorful "walnut chorizo"! A healthy, delicious nacho recipe that is baked in the oven. Vegan-adaptable and Gluten free!
ingredients: ½  teaspoon ground chipotle ( or sub cayenne), more to taste
1 tablespoon tomato paste ( or sub a canned chipotle pepper, or the adobo sauce from the can)
1 tablespoon water, and more to desired consistency
Tortilla chips ( enough to line a 13 x 18 inch sheet pan)
1 cup refried beans (optional) or black beans
1 1/2 cups vegan cheese ( 4-6 ounces) or make this vegan queso
Garnishes: pickled onion and jalapeño, hot sauce, vegan sour cream
fields.title: Vegan Nacho Recipe

fields.author: Sylvia Fountaine | Feasting at Home
fields.description: Nasi Goreng (Indonesian Fried Rice) loaded up with fresh veggies! Add chicken, shrimp or eggs, or keep it vegan with Tofu! Easy tasty recipe! Vegan-adaptable and gluten-free.
ingredients: 8-12 ounces crispy tofu, pan-seared chicken or shrimp- all optional
1 cup fresh shucked peas, snow peas, snap peas or green beans
2 eggs, whisked with a generous pinch salt  (optional)
3 cups cooked rice, (leftover, dried out, is best -see notes)
3 tablespoons soy sauce, more to taste (see notes) Or GF Liquid Aminos ( or sweet soy sauce- see notes)
1 1/2 tablespoons maple syrup, honey or palm sugar
optional seasonings: Terasi shrimp powder and Kecap Manis (see notes).
fields.title: Nasi Goreng (Indonesian Fried Rice)

fields.description: Try Oatmeal Soda Bread with Apricots for a change from the typical raisin soda bread. This healthy and hearty soda bread is made with rolled oats and dried apricots. This recipe makes 1 large loaf. The exact number of servings will vary based on how the loaf is sliced.
ingredients: 15 ounces all purpose flour (3 cups, see note)
3 ½ ounces old fashioned rolled oats (1 cup)
6 ounces dried apricots (about 25, diced into ½" bits)
fields.title: Oatmeal Soda Bread with Apricots

fields.description: Learn the art and science of baking. With a little guidance and a good recipe, anyone can bake from scratch.
fields.title: Home

fields.description: Perfectly tender and buttery vanilla cake layers. Super soft, yet strong enough for sculpted or wedding cakes.
ingredients: 8 ounces sour cream (1 cup, room temperature, divided)
12 ounces granulated sugar (1 ½ cups, divided)
9 ounces cake flour (2 cups, see note)
fields.title: Vanilla Butter Cake Recipe

fields.description: Silky chocolate ganache can be used to make truffles, fill a cake or tart and glaze any number of pastries.
ingredients: 1 ½ oz light corn syrup (2 tablespoons, optional (see note))
fields.title: Chocolate Ganache

fields.description: Light, fluffy and not too sweet, Italian Meringue Buttercream is a dream to work with. It takes on almost any flavor and is strong enough to pipe roses and other decorations. This recipe makes enough buttercream to fill and frost an 8" cake.
ingredients: 1 pound unsalted butter (room temperature, cut into 16 pieces)
fields.title: Italian Meringue Buttercream Recipe

fields.description: Tall and snow white, sprinkled with shredded coconut, it looks just as scrumptious as it is. This cake gets even prettier when you cut a slice and see the beautiful bright yellow layer of passion fruit curd in the middle.
ingredients: 1 recipe Vanilla Butter Cake (baked in two 8"x3" pans and completely cooled)
9 oz passion fruit curd made with gelatin (1 cup)
fields.title: Dreamy Coconut Passion Fruit Cake

fields.description: The classic dough used to line a tart pan.
ingredients: 6 ¼ oz all purpose flour (1 ¼ cups, see note)
fields.title: Tart Dough (pâte sucrée) Recipe

fields.description: Banana Cream Pie is great the day it's made, but it's even better the next day. The flavors meld and the bananas soften into the filling. It’s the perfect make-ahead dessert.
ingredients: 8 oz graham cracker crumbs (1 ½ cups)
5 oz granulated sugar (½ cup plus 2 tablespoons)
fields.title: Banana Cream Pie Recipe

fields.description: Make your own fresh blueberry preserves with a hint of lemon. Home canning is easier than you think!
fields.title: Blueberry Preserves with Lemon

fields.description: Make Zucchini Biscuits to use excess zucchini, and there's always excess zucchini. Basil and parmesan add a wonderful depth of flavor.
ingredients: 10 oz all-purpose flour (2 cups, see note)
fields.title: Zucchini Biscuits Recipe

fields.description: This Blueberry Cheesecake Tart gets an extra special flavor and crunch from the cornmeal crust and richness from the creamy cheesecake filling. This is thee perfect summer dessert!
ingredients: 3 ¾ oz all purpose flour (¾ cup)
3 ¾ cup Stone ground cornmeal (¾ cup)
4 oz unsalted butter (½ cup, room temperature)
fields.title: Blueberry Cheesecake Tart Recipe

fields.description: This Peach Crumb Pie is the perfect marriage of gorgeous tree ripened peaches with almond and brown sugar crumb topping.
ingredients: 3 pounds fresh peaches (peeled, pitted and sliced)
7 ½ oz all purpose flour (1 ½ cups, see note)
4 oz unsalted butter (at cool room temp (see note))
fields.title: Peach Crumb Pie Recipe

fields.description: Buttermilk Ice Cream has a tangy and luscious flavor that is unforgettable.
fields.title: Buttermilk Ice Cream Recipe

fields.description: A traditional Linzer Tart with hazelnut crust is given a twist with the Cranberries in Red Wine filling.
ingredients: 10 oz all purpose flour (2 cups, see note)
8 oz unsalted butter (cut into 1" chunks and chilled)
fields.title: Cranberry Linzer Tart

fields.description: Cajeta is a delicious caramel sauce made from goat's milk. It's takes several hours to make, but most of the time is hands-off.
ingredients: 1  Cinnamon stick ("true" or Mexican cinnamon is preferred)
fields.title: Cajeta Recipe - Mexican Caramel Sauce

fields.description: The super simple batter for Skillet Mexican Cornbread comes together in minutes. When it’s baked in a well-seasoned cast iron skillet, this cornbread gets a crunchy-crispy brown crust that is sooo yummy
ingredients: 1  jalapeno pepper (seeds and ribs removed and minced)
5 oz all-purpose flour (1 cup, see note)
fields.title: Skillet Mexican Cornbread with jalapenos and cheddar

fields.description: Ultra creamy banana cheesecake topped with rum-roasted bananas.
ingredients: 6 oz graham cracker crumbs (1 ½ cups)
8 oz very ripe bananas (about 2 medium, smashed with a fork)
½  vanilla bean (or 1/2 tsp vanilla extract)
fields.title: Banana Cheesecake With Rum Roasted Bananas

fields.description: Rustic and chewy with a substantial bite, Cracked Wheat Bread (or Bulgur Wheat Bread) is a hearty loaf full of whole wheat flavor and goodness. This recipe makes 1 large loaf. The exact number of servings will vary based on how the loaf is sliced.
ingredients: 3 ½ ounces bulgur or cracked wheat (½ cup)
5 ounces bread flour (1 cup, see note)
1  egg  (whisked with 1 tablespoon of water for egg wash)
fields.title: Cracked Wheat Bread (Bulgur Wheat Bread)

fields.description: Old fashioned buttermilk pie is updated with the addition of blackberries and a hint of cardamom.
ingredients: ½  vanilla bean (or 1 tsp vanilla extract)
fields.title: Blackberry Buttermilk Pie

fields.description: The only thing better than a perfectly buttery shortbread cookie is a wedge of Shortbread filled with Lemon Curd.
ingredients: 10 oz all purpose flour (2 cups, see note)
fields.title: Shortbread Filled with Lemon Curd

fields.description: Sweet, sour, spicy and delicious Kumquat Chutney. Make 3 pints.
fields.title: Kumquat Chutney

fields.description: Philly Cheesesteak Calzone, a twist on the most iconic dish from the Philadelphia region.
ingredients: 1 lb Ribeye steak (place in the freezer for 1 hour prior)
fields.title: Philly Cheesesteak Calzone

fields.description: Super moist banana cake layered with walnut streusel and topped with chunky walnut crumb topping.
ingredients: 2 ¼ oz cake flour (½ cup, see note)
8 oz very ripe bananas (weight after peeling)
fields.title: Banana Coffee Cake with Walnut Streusel

fields.description: With it's soft texture, hint of honey and hearty whole wheat flavor, Milk & Honey Whole Wheat Bread tastes fantastic and will keep fresh for several days. This recipe makes one 9"x5" loaf.
ingredients: 10 ounces bread flour (2 cups, see note)
7 ½ ounces whole wheat flour (1 ½ cups)
fields.title: Milk & Honey Whole Wheat Bread

fields.description: Sweet, tart apricots and salty, savory pistachios complement each other very nicely. For these Apricot & Pistachio Buns I highlight those flavors with a little cinnamon, ginger and one of my favorite spices, cardamom.
ingredients: 8 oz whole milk (1 cup scalded and cooled to 100 °F)
17 ½ oz unbleached all purpose flour (3 ½ cups, see note)
½ cup Apricot Preserves (heated for 30 seconds in the microwave)
fields.title: Apricot & Pistachio Buns

fields.description: What could be better on a warm summer evening than Pulled Pork Tacos with Grilled Peach Salsa? These tacos are bursting with flavor and are really easy to make ahead.
ingredients: 8 oz tomatillos (papery skin removed and rinsed (see note))
1 large Vidalia onion (peeled and sliced into 1" thick slabs)
½ teaspoon ground Cayenne Pepper (or to taste)
½ teaspoon dried Epazote or oregano
fields.title: Pulled Pork Tacos with Grilled Peach Salsa

fields.description: A hearty sourdough bread made with fresh corn, jalapeno peppers and cheese. It's a snack all by itself. Makes 2 large loaf.
ingredients: 8 oz active sourdough starter (1 cup, 100% hydration)
12 ½ oz all purpose flour (2 ½ cups, see note)
fields.title: Sourdough Cornbread Recipe

fields.description: Light and crusty focaccia with juicy cherry tomatoes, rosemary, sea salt & parmesan.
ingredients: 20 oz all purpose flour (4 cups, see note)
1 ¼ oz Whole Wheat Flour (¼ cup)
1  scant tablespoon roughly chopped fresh rosemary (from about 1 large or 2 small sprigs)
fields.title: Cherry Tomato Focaccia with Rosemary & Parmesan

fields.description: Fried dough stuffed with tequila spiked peaches.
ingredients: 3 pounds fresh peaches (peeled, pitted, chopped into 1/2" cubes)
fields.title: Fried Peach Hand Pies Recipe

fields.description: When you get a bounty of jalapeno peppers you can smoke them to make your own Chipotle Peppers and Chipotle Pepper Powder.
ingredients: Ripe (Red Jalapeno Peppers, as many as you've got.)
fields.title: DIY Chipotle Peppers

fields.description: Apple Maple Baklava still has everything  you love about the ancient treat – many leaves of Phyllo dough layered with walnuts and sweet syrup – but with typical American fall flavors added.
fields.title: Apple Maple Baklava

fields.description: This mix makes it super easy to make fresh scones at home and makes a lovely gift. Use the mixing instructions for 1 batch of mix.
ingredients: 12 ½ oz unbleached all purpose flour (2 ½ cups, see note)
3 oz dried cherries (½ cup, see note)
fields.title: Scone Mix Recipe

fields.description: This Piping Meringue is a super simple recipe for a meringue that’s stable enough to be piped into a variety of shapes.
fields.title: Meringue for Piping & Baking

fields.description: There is a better way to make cream cheese frosting. This recipe is lump-free and doesn't become runny. It has great cream cheese flavor.
fields.title: Cream Cheese Frosting Recipe

fields.description: Almond Madeleines, are they a cookie or a cake? I don’t care! I only know that they’re so easy to make and even easier to eat.
ingredients: 2 ½ oz all purpose flour (½ cup, see note)
5 oz granulated sugar (½ cup plus 2 tablespoons)
fields.title: Brown Butter Almond Madeleines

fields.description: Savory Dutch Pancakes (Pannekoeken) are satisfying for breakfast, lunch or even dinner.  This recipe makes 8 large, single-serving pancakes.
ingredients: 8 ½ oz all purpose flour (1 ⅔ cups, see note)
4 oz speck (or meat of your choice (see note))
4 oz young Gouda cheese (or cheese of your choice)
fields.title: Savory Dutch Pancakes - Pannekoeken

fields.description: If a buttery bundt cake and a fruit cake had a baby, then bathed that baby in Guinness, it would be this cake!
ingredients: 10 oz all purpose flour (2 cups, see note)
fields.title: Triple Guinness Bundt Cake

fields.description: Toasted coconut-graham cracker crust is filled with a layer of pineapple/rum curd, a layer of coconut/rum cream and topped with a mound of rum-spiked whipped cream and, finally, a sprinkle of toasted coconut.
ingredients: 5 oz graham cracker crumbs (1 ¼ cups)
5  canned pineapple slices (do not use fresh pineapple, see note)
fields.title: Piña Colada Pie (or Virgin Colada Pie)

fields.description: Got 10 minutes? Then all you need is four ingredients to make Chocolate Chip Coconut Macaroons. Tasty, easy and, as a bonus, gluten free!
ingredients: 3 oz granulated sugar (¼ cup plus 2 tablespoons)
fields.title: Chocolate Chip Coconut Macaroons

fields.description: Silky smooth & buttery, Butterscotch Sauce has a special and specific flavor with notes of molasses, butter, vanilla and salt.
ingredients: 1/2 teaspoon kosher salt (not table salt (see note))
fields.title: Butterscotch Sauce

fields.description: Creme Fraiche Ice Cream has a lovely, earthy flavor that goes well with fresh fruit, cooked fruit desserts and any type of ice cream sauce.
ingredients: ½  vanilla bean ( or 1 teaspoon vanilla extract)
fields.title: Creme Fraiche Ice Cream Recipe

fields.description: Ground sunflower seeds are used as a flour in the batter and whole sunflower seeds for a crunchy crumb topping.
ingredients: 1 ¼  all-purpose flour (¼ cup, see note)
7 ½ oz all purpose flour (1 ½ cups)
fields.title: Sunflower Crumb Muffins

fields.description: Butterscotch blondies filled with pools of real butterscotch sauce.
ingredients: 1 cup extra thick Butterscotch Sauce (see note)
7 ½ oz all purpose flour (1 ½ cups, see note)
fields.title: Butterscotch Ripple Blondies

fields.description: Chunks of fresh rhubarb are embedded in a sweet, yeasty dough. The fritters are fried until golden brown and iced with a glaze made from the rhubarb juice.
ingredients: 17 ½ oz all purpose flour (3 ½ cups, see note)
½ teaspoon coarsely ground black pepper
1 ½ pounds rhubarb (diced into ½" pieces)
fields.title: Rhubarb Fritters Recipe

fields.description: Fresh blueberries baked under a lightly sweet cornbread topping with just a hint of cinnamon. Blueberry Cornbread Cobbler baked in a cast iron skillet couldn’t be easier to make. It’s the perfect dessert for casual summer dining.
ingredients: 2 1/2 oz all purpose flour (1/2 cup, see note)
fields.title: Blueberry Cornbread Cobbler Recipe

fields.description: Key Lime Pie meets your favorite classic margarita in this luscious dessert.
ingredients: 8 oz graham cracker crumbs (1 ½ cups)
28 oz sweetened condensed milk (two 14 oz cans)
8 oz fresh lime juice (1 cup (about 6-8 limes))
fields.title: Margarita Pie

fields.description: An ice cream cake version of everyone's favorite Italian dessert made with homemade ice cream.
ingredients: ½  vanilla bean (or 1 tblsp vanilla extract)
fields.title: Tiramisu Ice Cream Cake Recipe

fields.description: Fudgy brownies with a surprise ingredient; beets! Orange and warm spices round out the flavor.
ingredients: 5 oz all purpose flour (1 cup, see note)
12 oz brown sugar (1 ½ cups, packed)
fields.title: Beet Brownies

fields.description: Three gorgeous layers of caramelized apple cinnamon upside down cake sandwiched with luscious real maple buttercream.
ingredients: ¾ oz dark rum (1 ½ tablespoons)
¼  vanilla bean (or ½ teaspoon vanilla extract)
8 oz sour cream (1 cup, room temp, divided in 1/2)
9 oz cake flour (2 cups, see note)
12 oz granulated sugar (1 ½ cups, divided)
fields.title: Apple Upside Down Layer Cake with Maple Buttercream

fields.description: Crackly, crunchy, chewy double ginger cookies are sandwiched with whipped Pumpkin ganache.
ingredients: 12 ½ ounces all-purpose flour (2 ½ cups, see note)
4 oz light brown sugar (½ cup packed)
1 cup granulated sugar for coating the cookies
4 ½ oz canned pumpkin puree (½ cup)
fields.title: Double Ginger Sandwich Cookies with Pumpkin Ganache filling

fields.description: A cake that thinks it's a candy cane. A red & white striped cake roll is filled with white chocolate-peppermint cream and chunks of crushed candy canes.
ingredients: 2 oz sour cream (¼ cup, room temperature)
4 ½ oz cake flour (1 cup, see note)
fields.title: Peppermint roulade

fields.description: A rich chocolate cheesecake flavored with orange zest and orange liquor and topped with mandarin orange slices.
fields.title: Chocolate Orange Cheesecake Recipe

fields.description: Old fashioned butterscotch pudding made with real butterscotch flavors and a hint of (optional) bourbon.
ingredients: 16 oz heavy cream (2 cups, divided in half)
fields.title: Bourbon Butterscotch Pudding

fields.description: Sloppy Joe Stuffed Biscuits are a real treat and a great way to use leftover Sloppy Joes. Flaky buttermilk biscuits are filled with savory meat & cheese filling and baked until golden brown. Use a smaller cutter to make appetizer-sized biscuits.
ingredients: 4 oz water (or use ¼ cup each red wine and water)
Salt, pepper and Parmesan cheese to taste
4 oz Asiago Cheese (or cheese of your choice)

fields.description: Baileys Pot de Creme looks sophisticated, but they're kind of like a grown up version of pudding cups with an Irish Cream flavor. Easy to make with just 5 ingredients, and so tasty.
ingredients: 12 oz Baileys Irish Cream (1 ½ cups)

fields.description: A super tender cake made with buttermilk and almond flour is topped with fresh mango slices and buttery caramel with a hint of lime.

6 ¾ oz cake flour (1 ½ cups, see note)
4 oz butter (room temp, cut into 1" pieces)

fields.description: Marble Cake doesn't have to have two totally different textures between the vanilla and chocolate swirls. I created a process for making marble cake so that both flavors have the same exact soft and tender crumb. This cake is so tasty and so pretty.
ingredients: 11 ½ oz cake flour (2 ½ cups, separated, see note)
12 oz unsalted butter (room temperature, cut into 1" chunks)
2 ¼ oz cocoa powder (½ cup, preferably Dutch processed)

ingredients: 5 oz whole wheat flour (1 cup, see note)
7 ½ oz all purpose flour (1 ½ cups)

fields.description: Move over peanut brittle, there's a more exotic candy in town. Black Sesame Seed Brittle is a candy for grown ups. If you've never made candy at home, you'll be shocked how easy this recipe is.
ingredients: 5 ½ oz light corn syrup (1 cup)

fields.description: A dessert pie made with fresh sweet corn and buttermilk custard scented with vanilla, lime zest and cinnamon. This is a heavenly summer treat.
ingredients: ½ recipe Perfect Pie Crust ( or store bought pie crust)
½  vanilla bean (or 1 tablespoon vanilla extract)
fields.title: Sweet Corn Buttermilk Pie

ingredients: 1 quart plain whole-milk yogurt (not Greek yogurt)

ingredients: 2 ½ oz honey roasted peanuts (½ cup)
5 oz graham cracker crumbs (1 ¼ cup)
1 cup any flavor jelly (or 4 oz semi-sweet chocolate (see note))
14 oz creamy peanut butter (1 ½ cups)
1 ¼ oz honey-roasted peanuts (¼ cup coarsely chopped)

fields.description: Classic Almond Petit Fours made with rich almond cake and a quick fondant icing that can be made from powdered sugar.
ingredients: 4 ½ oz cake flour (1 cup, see note)
fields.title: Almond Petit Fours

fields.description: Almond Filled Stollen is a traditional German/Austrian bread rich with butter, almond paste, candied fruit and a hint of rum. Makes 2 large loaves.
ingredients: 4 oz whole milk (½ cup, scalded then cooled to 110 °F.)
12 ½ oz bread flour (2 ½ cups, see note)
fields.title: Almond Filled Stollen

fields.description: Soft, melt in your mouth jelly candies made with real blackberry juice. The candies are rolled in vanilla sugar for a pretty and tasty finish.
fields.title: Blackberry Pate de Fruit (Fruit Jellies)

fields.description: Classic croissants take on a extra special flavor when made with sourdough starter. To have warm Sourdough Croissants for breakfast, refrigerate overnight and bake in the morning.
ingredients: 8 oz active sourdough starter (1 cup, 100% hydration)
10 oz whole milk (1 ¼ cups, scalded and cooled to 110 °F)
17 ½ oz unbleached all purpose flour (3 ½ cups, see note)
16 oz unsalted butter (pliable but still cool)
fields.title: Overnight Sourdough Croissants

fields.description: Gougères are cheesy, light puffs made with pâte à choux, the "cream puff" batter. They are wonderful as hors d'oeuvres, appetizer or palate cleanser for a wine tasting party. They can be stuffed with a savory filling for a more substantial bite.
ingredients: 5 oz bread flour (1 cup, see note)

fields.description: Chewy, crusty and properly dense, New York style bagels. They rise overnight so you can have fresh bagels for breakfast or brunch.  All they need is a schmear of cream cheese.
ingredients: ¼ oz instant yeast (2 ¼ teaspoons)
25 oz bread flour (5 cups, divided, see note)
1 ½ oz barley malt syrup ( 2 tablespoons, see note)
Topping (Sesame seeds, poppy seeds, caraway seeds or coarse sea salt)

fields.description: You can make classic Cherry Cordials at home. Cherries, Kirschwasser, and dark chocolate come together for the ultimate candy treat.
ingredients: 2 ¾ oz light corn syrup (¼ cup)

fields.description: These are no ordinary brownies! They are perfectly Fudgey brownies studded with luxurious Italian Maraschino cherries and iced with whipped White Chocolate Cherry Ganache. They are as pretty as they are delicious.
ingredients: 5 oz all purpose flour (1 cup, see note)
fields.title: Chocolate Cherry Brownies

fields.description: A savory pie crust with a special flavor and texture from rye flour.
ingredients: 10 oz all purpose flour (2 cups (see note))
½ teaspoon coarsely ground black pepper
4 oz butter (very cold and sliced into 1/4" thin slices)
fields.title: Rye Pie Crust Recipe

fields.description: Irish Tea Brack is a not-too-sweet bread that is moist and filled with dried fruits soaked in strong black tea. Glaze the loaf with honey and (optional) whiskey when it's hot from the oven.
ingredients: 12 ounces freshly brewed black tea (1 ¼ cups)
10 ounces all purpose flour (2 cups, see note)
fields.title: Irish Tea Brack

fields.description: When you need to feed a crowd, Blackberry Slab Pie is the way to go.  A flakey pastry crust is filled with barely sweetened blackberries and a whisper of lemon.  The recipe can be halved for a smaller crowd.
fields.title: Blackberry Slab Pie

fields.description: A soft pound cake with an even crumb, melt-in-your-mouth texture and great coconut flavor. This is a really great pound cake that will satisfy your coconut cravings!
ingredients: 8 oz cake flour (1 ¾ cups, see note)
fields.title: Coconut Pound Cake Recipe

fields.description: Chewy, crusty and properly dense New York style bagels with an extra depth of flavor thanks to the sourdough starter. They rise overnight so you can have fresh bagels for breakfast or brunch.  All they need is a schmear of cream cheese.
ingredients: 8 oz active sourdough starter (1 cup (100% hydration))
22 ½ oz bread flour (4 ½ cups, divided, see note)
1 ½ oz barley malt syrup (2 tablespoons (or honey + molasses))
Topping (sesame seeds, poppy seeds, caraway seeds or coarse salt)
fields.title: Sourdough Bagel Recipe

fields.description: Malted Milk Cream Pie is a luscious and comforting treat. Buttery graham cracker crust is filled with a custard flavored with malted milk powder. The whipped cream topping also has malted milk flavor.
ingredients: 7 oz  graham cracker crumbs (1 ½ cups)
1 ½ oz malted milk powder (¼ cup)
fields.title: Malted Milk Cream Pie Recipe

fields.description: Rhubarb Upside Down Cake is made with beautiful red rhubarb, caramel topping and melt-in-your-mouth almond buttermilk cake. It all comes together with a hint of ginger.
ingredients: 1 ½ pounds rhubarb (cut lengthwise to about 1/2" thick stalks)
7 oz cake flour (1 ½ cups, see note)
4 oz butter (room temp, cut into 1" pieces)
fields.title: Rhubarb Upside Down Cake Recipe

fields.description: Delicious and creamy homemade ice cream flavored with fragrant vanilla bean. Rich with egg yolks, it's a real treat.
fields.title: Vanilla Ice Cream Recipe

fields.description: To make Sourdough Rye Bread you can start the night before and have fresh bread for lunch. This recipe makes one large loaf or two smaller loaves. The exact number of servings will vary based on how the loaf is sliced.
ingredients: 8 oz active sourdough starter (1 cup (100% hydration))
12 ½ oz bread flour (2 ½ cups, see note)
fields.title: Sourdough Rye Bread Recipe

fields.author: Eileen Gray
fields.description: What to do with all those left over eggs yolks? Don't worry, I've got you covered with 25 recipes that use all yolks or more yolks than whites.
fields.title: What to do with Egg Yolks

fields.description: Zucchini Cake with Cream Cheese Frosting is a real treat. The lightly spiced cake is made super moist and flavorful thanks to a whole bunch of shredded zucchini. Luscious Cream Cheese Frosting is the perfect finish for this easy to make cake.
ingredients: 7 ½ oz all purpose flour (1 ½ cups, see note)
fields.title: Zucchini Cake Recipe

fields.description: Flaky pie crust is filled with vanilla scented concord grapes. Cut a simple  grape cluster design on the top crust for a pretty finish.
ingredients: 2 ½ pounds Concord grapes (weight after stemming)
fields.title: Concord Grape Pie

fields.description: Lemon curd is an incredibly easy to make recipe that is unbelievably versatile in the kitchen. Use curd for a spread on scones, as a tart filling, a cake filling or the base for a feathery lemon mousse. This recipe makes about 3 cups of curd.
ingredients: 4 oz lemon juice (½ cup, about 3-4 lemons)
finely grated zest from all the lemons
fields.title: Lemon Curd Recipe

fields.description: This bread has typical snickerdoodle flavor from cream of tartar in the batter. It has a crunchy, crackly cinnamon sugar crust on the outside and TWO cinnamon ripples on the  inside.
ingredients: 11 ¼ oz all purpose flour (2 ¼ cups, see note)
fields.title: Snickerdoodle Bread

fields.description: A Perfect Pie Crust is a thing of beauty. The addition of a little sourdough discard adds an intriguing depth of flavor to a basic pie dough. This makes enough dough for a double crust pie.
ingredients: 7 ½ oz all purpose flour (1 ½ cups (see note))
4 oz vegetable shortening (or leaf lard, cold)
4 oz unsalted butter (very cold and sliced into ¼" thin slices)
fields.title: Sourdough Pie Crust

fields.description: Filled Speculaas Cake! If you love speculaas (speculoos, windmill) cookies, you'll really love this giant cookie/cake filled with luscious almond paste.
ingredients: 5 oz all purpose flour (1 cup, see note)
4 oz unsalted butter (chilled cut into 1" pieces)
fields.title: Filled Speculaas Cake (Gevulde Speculaas)

fields.description: This classic buttermilk scone is given a little flavor boost with sourdough discard.
ingredients: 22 ½ oz unbleached all purpose flour ( 4 ½ cups, see note)
6 oz unsalted butter (cold, cut into 1" chunks)
fields.title: Sourdough Scone Recipe

fields.description: The perfect little cookie - Tender pistachio cookie dough sandwiched with apricot preserves. Just a hint of rum gives the cookie a special flavor.
ingredients: 7 ½ oz all-purpose flour (1 ½ cups, see note)
16 oz apricot preserves (about 1 cup after straining)
fields.title: Pistachio Apricot Linzer Cookies

fields.description: Rich bread made with sour cream and cornmeal is layered with a cheesy, bacony, spicy filling. Simply "pull apart" the layers of bread to enjoy this delicious bread. Makes 1 large loaf.
ingredients: 3 oz sour cream (⅓ cup, room temperature)
10 oz all purpose flour (2 cups, see note)
fields.title: Bacon & Pepper Jack Pull Apart Bread

fields.description: You can make Sourdough Starter from scratch without any commercial yeast. You just need 3 ingredients and 7-10 days and you can begin making your own sourdough bread at home. This recipe makes 12 ounces of active starter.
ingredients: 1 oz whole grain rye or whole wheat flour (see note)
10 oz unbleached all purpose flour (for feeding)
fields.title: Sourdough Starter Recipe

fields.author: Eileen Gray
fields.description: I've put together a collection of recipes that use sourdough discard. If you're a sourdough baker, you know how painful it is to throw away that hard earned yeasty goodness each time you have to feed the starter.
fields.title: Recipes that use Sourdough Discard

fields.description: This basic Sourdough Bread Recipe produces an artisan loaf with a crisp crust and chewy crumb. It is best baked in a Dutch oven, but the recipe is very flexible and adaptable. This recipe makes 1 large loaf. The exact number of servings will vary based on how the loaf is sliced.
fields.title: Artisan Sourdough Bread Recipe

fields.description: If you've ever had a true Bialy, you know it's not just a bagel without the hole in the middle. Bialys are not boiled, so the crust is crisper than the crust of a bagel. Best of all, a Sourdough Bialys gets a boost of flavor and a special texture from the sourdough starter
ingredients: 8 oz active sourdough starter (1 cup, 100% hydration)
17 ½ oz bread flour (3 ½ cups, see note)
fields.title: Sourdough Bialy Recipe

fields.description: Red Velvet Cake has been around at least since the 1920s but has enjoyed a renewed popularity over the last few years. This cake is wonderful filled and iced with either Cream Cheese Frosting or the more traditional Ermine Frosting. This recipe make a 3 layer 8" or 9" cake.
ingredients: 15 oz all purpose flour (3 cups, see note)
fields.title: Red Velvet Cake

fields.description: The perfect little cookie - Tender hazelnut cookie dough sandwiched with hazelnut chocolate paste. Just a hint of rum gives the cookie a special flavor.
ingredients: 3 ¾ oz all-purpose flour (¾ cup, see note)
fields.title: Nutella Sandwich Cookies

fields.author: Eileen Gray
fields.description: I going to show you how to dry sourdough starter. Why? Because drying is the best way to preserve your sourdough starter for the long term.
fields.title: How to Dry Sourdough Starter

fields.author: Eileen Gray
fields.description: Want to know how to shape pizza dough so you get a perfectly round pie with a light and airy crust? Don't use a rolling pin because hand shaped pizza dough has the best texture.
fields.title: How to Shape Pizza Dough

fields.description: Soft buttermilk cake loaded with fresh rhubarb & crowned with brown sugar crumb topping.
ingredients: 6 ¾ oz cake flour (1 ½ cups, see note)
1 pound rhubarb (cut into ½" dice (about 3 cups))
fields.title: Rhubarb Crumb Cake Recipe

fields.description: Super soft with just a hint of sweetness, homemade Hot Dog Buns are worth the time. They freeze really well.
ingredients: 15 oz bread flour (3 cups, see note)
fields.title: Hot Dog Buns

fields.description: Homemade Cookie Dough Ice Cream is sooo worth the effort. Molasses in the brown sugar makes the ice cream soft and luscious. Clumps of buttery, edible cookie dough are folded into the ice cream.

fields.description: Start making Sourdough Pancakes the night before and have hot fresh pancakes for breakfast.
ingredients: 8 oz unfed sourdough starter (1 cup, 100% hydration)
10 oz All-Purpose Flour (2 cups, see note)
fields.title: Sourdough Pancakes

fields.description: Fresh peaches baked under a cream biscuit topping with a hint of vanilla. Peach Cobbler baked in a cast iron skillet couldn’t be easier to make. It’s the perfect dessert for casual summer dining.
ingredients: 3 pounds fresh peaches (peeled, pitted and cut into 1" cubes)
5 oz all-purpose flour (1 cup, see note)
4 oz unsalted butter (cold, cut into ¼" slices)

fields.description: Homemade Chunky Granola is a nutritious and delicious treat that you can enjoy for breakfast or as a snack. This recipe is abundant with healthy ingredients like walnuts, oats, protein-rich egg whites and has a hint of honey sweetness. This recipe makes about 12 cups of granola.
ingredients: 2 oz flax seed meal (½ cup, or almond meal)

fields.description: This beautiful Apple Danish Braid is made with real danish pastry dough and filled with fresh apples. You can let the apple danish pastry rise in the refrigerator overnight and bake it first thing in the morning.
ingredients: 1 ½ pounds apples (peeled, cored and cut into 1/2" cubes)
4 oz apple cider (½ cup, or apple juice)
¼ cup apple jelly (or apricot preserves)

fields.description: You can make honest to goodness Sourdough Danish Pastry at home. The recipe takes more than 12 hours, but the vast majority of the time is hands-off.
ingredients: 8 oz active sourdough starter (1 cup, 100% hydration)
4 oz whole milk (½ cup, scalded and cooled to 105°F)
11 ¼ oz all purpose flour (2 ¼ cups, see note)
8 oz unsalted butter (cold, cut into ½" cubes)

fields.description: Light and fluffy Cranberry Orange Scones are perfect for breakfast, afternoon tea or snack time.
ingredients: 12 ½ oz unbleached all purpose flour (2 ½ cups, see note)
3 oz unsalted butter (cold, cut into 1" chunks)
8 oz cranberries (fresh or frozen, 1 ½ cups)
fields.title: Cranberry Orange Scones

fields.description: This Sourdough Baguette Recipe produces two artisan loaves with a crisp crust and chewy crumb. Makes 2 baguettes.

fields.description: The classic french pastry made with nut dacquoise (meringue) dark chocolate ganache, chocolate cream and hazelnut buttercream.
ingredients: 1 ¼ ounces all purpose flour (¼ cup)
fields.title: Marjolaine (Dacquoise) Recipe

fields.description: Kouign-Amann is a crisp, buttery, sweet and delicious treat made with layers of yeasted dough, butter and sugar.
ingredients: 10 ounces all purpose flour (2 cups, see note)
fields.title: Homemade Kouign-Amann Recipe

fields.description: Vanilla Mousse is an ethereal, light as air dessert flavored with real vanilla bean. Serve it with fresh fruit, chocolate shavings or fruit sauce.
ingredients: 2 tablespoons dark rum (or other liquor or water))

fields.description: This classic pastry features enriched yeasted cake doused with lots of rum syrup. The babas are brushed with apricot glaze for a kick of fruit flavor and topped with whipped cream for a luscious finish.
ingredients: 4 ounces whole milk (1/2 cup, scalded and cooled to 110 °F)
2 ¼ teaspoons instant dry yeast (1 packet)
15 ounces all purpose flour (3 cups, see note)
3 ounces unsalted butter (softened to room temperature)

fields.description: Classic Brioche dough bakes up to a light and silky bread. It can also be the basis of many delicious pastries. This recipe makes 2 large loaves.
ingredients: 6 oz whole milk (¾ cup, scalded and cooled)
17 ½ oz bread flour (3 ½ cups, see note)
8 oz unsalted European butter (at cool room temperature)
fields.title: Classic Brioche

fields.description: Sourdough Brioche bakes up to a light and silky bread. It can also be the basis of many delicious pastries. This recipe makes 2 large loaves.
ingredients: 8 oz active sourdough starter (1 cup, 100% hydration)
2 oz whole milk (¼ cup, scalded and cooled to 110°F)
16 ¼ oz bread flour (3 ¼ cups, see note)
8 oz unsalted European butter (1 cup, cool room temperature)
fields.title: Sourdough Brioche

fields.description: Meyer Lemon Bars! Buttery shortbread is topped with zesty and floral Meyer lemon custard for a slight twist on the classic American treat.

8 oz Meyer lemon juice (1 cup, about 6 lemons)

fields.description: Swiss Meringue Buttercream is light, fluffy and not too sweet. This frosting is a dream to work with. It takes on almost any flavor and is strong enough to pipe roses and other decorations. This recipe makes enough buttercream to fill and frost an 8" cake.

fields.description: German Buttercream is less sweet than American Buttercream and a little easier to make than Italian Meringue Buttercream. It's rich thanks to the custard base of the frosting. This recipe makes enough buttercream to fill and frost an 8" cake.
ingredients: ½  vanilla bean (split or 1 tablespoon vanilla extract)

fields.description: Classic French Buttercream is light, fluffy and not too sweet. This frosting is a dream to work with and will take on any flavor you'd like. This recipe makes enough buttercream to fill and frost an 8" cake
ingredients: 1 pound unsalted butter (room temperature, cut into 16 pieces)

fields.author: Eileen Gray
fields.description: Buttercream, frosting, icing, whatever you call it, here is an extensive list of recipes for you to choose from when filling and frosting your next cake

fields.description: Triple Lemon Yogurt Pound Cake is perfumed with fresh lemon zest and enhanced with tangy yogurt! This is a great pound cake with an even crumb and melt in your mouth texture.

8 oz cake flour (1 ¾ cups, see note)

fields.description: Rhubarb curd is an easy to make recipe that is unbelievably versatile in the kitchen. Use curd as spread on scones, as a tart or cake filling or drizzle it over ice cream. Buy rhubarb when it's in season and freeze it to make curd any time you like. This recipe makes about 3 cups of curd.

fields.description: Rhubarb Meringue Tart is an elegant twist on the traditional pie. This tart has luscious curd filling in a crisp crust and it's topped with mounds of toasted meringue.

fields.description: Sourdough Hoagie Rolls. Hoagie, hero, sub, grinder, whatever you call your sandwich, this is a great roll for building your masterpiece.

4 oz milk (½ cup, scalded and cooled to room temperature)
7 ½ oz unbleached bread flour (1 ½ cups)

fields.description: Seven Minute Frosting is an old-fashioned recipe that should never go out of style. It's sweet. It's fluffy. It's a veritable  cloud of a frosting. Even better, you need just a handful of pantry ingredients and about 7 minutes to make this recipe.

fields.description: Cherry Strudel made with tart cherries and crisp phyllo dough. It's perfect for dessert or brunch.

1 ½ oz dry bread crumbs (½ cup)

fields.description: Blackberry Lavender Preserves can be made with fresh or frozen berries. Floral lavender is the perfect accent flavor for luscious blackberries. This recipe makes about 5 half pints.

3 oz stone ground whole wheat flour (¾ cup)

fields.description: Jelly Roll Cake is a classic treat that is truly easy to make. Light and airy vanilla cake is the perfect wrapping for sweet, tangy raspberry preserves. This is a great make-ahead recipe.

fields.description: Buttery oatmeal cookie dough is enhanced with a cup of sourdough discard. The cookies are topped with a lemony glaze.

8 oz light brown sugar (1 cup, packed)

fields.description: These Cornmeal Biscuits are rich and fluffy. They have a light crunch and great taste from the cornmeal. A honey glaze is the perfect finish.
ingredients: 14 oz All purpose flour (2 3/4 cups, see note)
8 oz unsalted butter (cold and cut into 16 pieces)
16 oz Buttermilk  (2 cups plus more for brushing)

fields.description: Silky milk chocolate ganache can be used to make truffles, fill a cake or tart and glaze any number of pastries. The recipe makes about 2 cups.

fields.description: Salted Caramel Eclairs! Crisp pastry shells filled with luscious salted caramel cream and topped with a glaze of caramelized sugar.

fields.description: Lemon Meringue Pie! Flaky pie crust filled with zesty filling and topped with billowy, toasty meringue is a thing of beauty. There’s a reason this is a classic recipe.

fields.author: Eileen Gray
fields.description: Sourdough Starter Powder! Introducing a whole new way to store and use sourdough starter or sourdough discard. Dry it then grind it to a powder. After you dry your sourdough starter, you can grind it into a powder and add it directly to a recipe for a flavor boost or rehydrate it to use in any sourdough recipe.rn

fields.author: Eileen Gray
fields.description: Chocolate Shavings can dress up your homemade cakes so they look like they came from a high-end pastry shop. They're easy to make at home

ingredients: 4 each egg whites (4.75 oz, room temp)
1/2 recipe Chocolate Whipped Cream (prepared after the meringues are baked and cooled)

15 oz all purpose flour (3 cups, see note)

2 oz Baileys Irish Cream Liqueur (¼ cup)

2 oz freeze dried strawberries (3 cups before grinding)

fields.description: Chocolate Tart Dough (also known as short dough or pate sucre) is a slightly sweet cookie-like dough that is perfect for making fruit tarts and cream pies. It's dead-simple to make and freezes very well.

5 oz unsalted butter (room temperature, see note*)

5 oz all purpose flour (1 cup, see note)

fields.description: This Lemon Chiffon Cake starts with my classic Vanilla Chiffon Cake base and layers in lemon flavor three ways — the juice, the zest and extract. The result is a tender, airy cake with unmistakable lemon flavor.

10 oz cake flour (2 ¼ cups, see note)

fields.description: Delicious and creamy homemade ice cream flavored with blueberries. Fresh berries makes an ice cream with a deep blueberry flavor and gorgeous color.

It makes the most amazing French Toast! This recipe makes 1 loaf. The exact number of servings will vary based on how the loaf is sliced.

7 ½ oz all purpose flour (1 ½ cups, see note)

fields.description: Shortbread Cookies! These perfectly buttery shortbread cookies have a wonderful, rich flavor and crisp texture.

fields.description: Rich, creamy cheesecake scented with nutmeg and spiked with a healthy dose of Bourbon. Gingersnap crust and whipped cream topping finish the cake.
