fields.description: Silky chocolate ganache make luscious homemade truffles. Roll the truffles in your choice of topping.

1 cup chocolate sprinkles (or your choice of toppings)

ingredients: 12 oz whole milk (1 ½ cups, see note)
1 large peach (peeled and diced to ½")

fields.description: Apple Dumplings can easily be made from scratch. Wrap apple halves in flaky dough then bake them in a simple brown sugar syrup for built-in sauce.

1 recipe cream cheese dough (made at least 2 hours ahead and chilled)

fields.description: Fresh apples baked under a cream biscuit topping with a hint of vanilla. Apple Cobbler baked in a cast iron skillet couldn’t be easier to make. It’s the perfect dessert for casual dining.

5 oz all-purpose flour (1 cup, see note)
4 oz unsalted butter (cold, cut into ¼" slices)

fields.description: Pear cake with a hint of vanilla bean is perfect in it's simplicity. It's super easy to make yet is a totally satisfying treat that you'll make over and over again.

fields.description: Homemade marshmallows are in another league from store bought. Cocoa powder gives the marshmallows a tempting chocolatey flavor.
ingredients: ¾ oz unflavored gelatin powder (2 T + 1 t )
20 oz granulated sugar (2 ½ cups, divided)

fields.description: This classic French pastry is made with layers of  buttery puff pastry encasing a luscious almond frangipane filling. It's a treat that strikes the perfect balance between simplicity and sophistication.
ingredients: 1 ¼ pound Puff pastry (½ recipe or 2 sheets store-bought)
¼ teaspoon almond extract (adjust based on the strength of your extract)

fields.description: Chocolate Ganache Cake! Super-dark and moist chocolate cake layers are filled and iced with light and luscious whipped chocolate ganache. This is a chocoholic's dream cake.

9 ounces cake flour (2 cups, see note)

4 oz unsweetened canned coconut milk (¼ cup)
2 ½  oz all purpose flour (½ cup)
12 oz unsweetened canned coconut milk (1 ½ cups)

This is the perfect loaf for making panini, or just tear off a hunk and dip it in olive oil. This recipe makes 1 loaf. The exact number of servings will vary based on how the loaf is sliced.

fields.description: Spectacular cake for a special occasion.
ingredients: 4 oz dutch process cocoa powder (1 cup)
9  large egg whites (11 oz, at room temperature)

fields.description: A simple and perfect little cookie. Thin and crisp with iconic browned edges and a distinct vanilla flavor.
ingredients: 4 oz unsalted butter (room temperature, see note)
5 oz all purpose flour (1 cup, see note)

fields.description: Whole Wheat Sourdough Pita Bread is rich with whole grain flavor and a touch honey sweetness. It's so fun to watch the bread rounds balloon in the oven.
ingredients: 8 oz active sourdough starter (1 cup,100% hydration)
10 oz bread flour (2 cups, see note)
fields.title: Sourdough Whole Wheat Pita Bread Recipe

fields.description: A rich, fudgey chocolate sauce is the perfect ice cream sundae topping. This recipe makes 2 cups of sauce.
ingredients: 5 ½ oz light corn syrup (½ cup)
4 oz brewed coffee (or water ½ cup)

fields.description: Delicious and creamy homemade ice cream flavored with Baileys Irish Cream. Rich and slightly boozy, it's a real treat.

fields.description: This Pistachio Pound Cake has a nutty and buttery flavor, a very tender crumb and a sweet vanilla glaze to finish. The chopped toasted nuts on top add a final nutty crunch.

fields.description: A hearty take on the classic buttermilk scone made with rye flour, honey and caraway seeds.

1 tablespoon caraway seeds (plus more for topping)
6 oz unsalted butter (cold, cut into ½" cubes)

fields.description: Crunchy hazelnut biscotti cookies flavored with cocoa, cinnamon and chocolate chips. Perfect for dunking into coffee or espresso.

12 ½ oz all purpose flour (2 ½ cups, see note)
2 oz dutch process cocoa powder (½ cup)
fields.title: Hazelnut Chocolate Biscotti

fields.description: Sourdough Stollen is a traditional German/Austrian bread rich with butter, almond paste and candied fruit. The recipe gets an upgrade in flavor from active sourdough starter.  Makes 2 large loaves.

fields.description: Fresh pears baked under a cream biscuit topping with a hint of vanilla. Pear Cobbler baked in a cast iron skillet couldn’t be easier to make. It’s the perfect dessert for casual dining.
ingredients: 3 ¾ oz all-purpose flour (¾ cup, see note)
4 oz unsalted butter (cold, cut into ½" cubes)
fields.title: Pear Cobbler

fields.description: New York style bagels flavored with plenty of cinnamon and sweet raisins. They rise overnight so you can have fresh bagels for breakfast or brunch.
ingredients: ¼ ounces instant yeast (2 ¼ teaspoons)
25 ounces bread flour (5 cups, divided, see note)
1 ½ ounces barley malt syrup (2 tablespoons)

fields.description: Baileys brownies are a rich & chocolatey cake with an entire cup of Irish cream liquor in the batter. Even better, there's a swirl of Baileys cheesecake throughout the brownies.
ingredients: 5 oz all purpose flour (1 cup, see note)
fields.title: Baileys Irish Cream Brownies

fields.author: Eileen Gray
fields.description: In this collection you’ll find classic shortcakes and a few unexpected treats that let strawberries shine in different ways.

fields.description: Delicious and creamy ice cream flavored with homemade pistachio paste and a hint of orange. Studded with crunchy candied pistachios, it's a real treat. Makes a quart of ice cream.

fields.description: Cherry Sorbet is made with fresh Bing cherries a splash of red wine and just enough sugar to highlight the fruit flavor.
ingredients: 4 oz red wine (½ cup, see note)
fields.title: Cherry Sorbet

fields.description: Sourdough rolls with a crispy, crunchy "tiger" topping and soft interior crumb. There's a hint of whole wheat flour for extra flavor. Makes 1 loaf or 8 large rolls.

fields.description: These are the perfect, moist Chocolate Cupcakes. Top them with your favorite frosting.
ingredients: 1 ounce Dutch process cocoa powder (¼ cup)
2 ounces boiling water (¼ cup, see note)
4 ½ ounces cake flour (1 cups, see note)
fields.title: Chocolate Cupcakes

fields.description: A dark chocolate tart crust filled with chocolate crémeux gets a spark of flavor from pink peppercorns.
ingredients: chocolate shavings (or mini chips, for garnish)

fields.description: Lemon Swiss Roll Cake is light and airy. Lemon scented sponge cake is the perfect wrapping for floral and tangy Meyer Lemon curd. This is a great make-ahead recipe.
ingredients: 2 oz Meyer lemon juice (¼ cup, about 1-2 lemons)
finely grated zest from the lemons
5 oz all purpose flour (1 cup, see note)

fields.author: Eileen Gray
fields.description: Got oats in the pantry? These oat recipes show how oats add texture, moisture, and cozy character to baked goods—from cookies and bars to muffins, breads, and more. Practical ideas you’ll actually want to bake.

fields.description: This Black Pepper Stir Fried Udon is the perfect SOS dinner! Saucy udon noodles, dark soy sauce, stir fry veggies, fresh garlic, and lots of freshly ground black pepper. So easy!

a little bit of neutral oil

one 14-ounce can full fat coconut milk

fields.title: Traffic and Income Report – July 2015

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: Fusion food at its finest! Korean BBQ Beef, rice, kimchi, and yum yum sauce all rolled up in a soft flour tortilla.
ingredients: 2 pears, peeled and cut into chunks
cilantro, basil, green onions, maybe even mint if you’re bold
sriracha mayo or yum yum sauce
fields.title: Korean BBQ Burrito

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: Roasted Cauliflower Lettuce Wraps with Korean BBQ-Inspired Sauce! Crispy roasted cauliflower tossed in a sweet and sticky Korean BBQ sauce, all topped with chives, peanuts, and spicy mayo. YUM.
ingredients: 6-8 cups small cauliflower florets (1 large or 2 small heads)
spicy mayo (1/4 cup mayo with a 1 teaspoon of sriracha)
1 tablespoon sambal oelek (or a spicy chile paste, or sriracha – use less for a milder sauce)
fields.title: Roasted Cauliflower Lettuce Wraps with Korean BBQ-Inspired Sauce

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: Filling, fresh, and vibrant lemony chicken soup made creamy with NO CREAM and a secret ingredient! Recipe adapted from Cooking Light.
ingredients: 3-ish cups cooked chicken (I use shredded rotisserie chicken)
as much fresh dill as you can handle
fields.title: Lemon Chicken Soup with Orzo

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: Amazing Lemon Pancakes that are light, fluffy, and easy to make topped with a blackberry syrup made from blackberry jam. Delicious for a weekend brunch!
ingredients: 2 tablespoons butter, melted and cooled slightly
fields.title: Lemon Pancakes and Blackberry Syrup

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: Two whole weeks! Lucky us. Every year for the last ten (whoa!), my family has been going up to a cabin in Wisconsin for a few weeks in the summer. It's a
fields.title: Life At The Cabin

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: 30 Minute Masala Sauce! made with onions, garlic, turmeric, cumin, chili powder, lemon juice, cilantro, tomatoes, and coconut milk. Perfect sauce for veggie or chicken tikka masala! Vegetarian / Vegan
ingredients: 2 onions (I used one yellow, one purple)
a small pile of cilantro stems
1 1/2 cups tomato puree + 1/2 cup water or broth
fields.title: Life-Changing 30 Minute Masala Sauce

fields.author: Bjork Ostrom
fields.description: Hiya! Bjork here, sending you greetings from Three Lakes, Wisconsin. Lindsay and I are here at a cabin for the week spending some quality time with her
fields.title: May Traffic and Income Report – $7,093.52

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: Hey there friends! Bjork here, checking in for the monthly traffic and income report on Pinch of Yum. We started doing these reports over three years ago
fields.title: May Traffic and Income Report – $24,946.00

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: This Mexican polenta pie is true comfort food! Made with pork and pinto beans in the crockpot and baked with polenta and cheese.
ingredients: 1 lb. pork butt or pork shoulder (a large semi-fatty cut of meat with no bones)
12 oz. light beer + 12 oz. water (just refill the bottle)
1 14 oz. can corn, drained and rinsed
salt and pepper to taste (be generous!)
shredded cheese, cilantro, and salsa for topping
fields.title: Mexican Polenta Pie

fields.author: Bjork Ostrom
fields.description: Hiya! Bjork here. I'm checking in for the monthly Pinch of Yum income report. Just over a year ago Lindsay and I decided to start tracking the income that
fields.title: September Income Report – $5,466.69

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: Migas - eggs scrambled with crispy tortillas, garlic, jalapeño, and melted cheese served with black beans and avocado. Quick, easy, and SO DELICIOUS. Breakfast, lunch, dinner, or brunch!
ingredients: 5-6 small corn tortillas, cut into strips
1/2 cup shredded Pepperjack or other cheese
black beans, Cotija cheese, salt, pepper, avocado, tomato salsa for serving
fields.title: The Best Migas

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: This recipe for Filipino-style monggo beans (aka mung bean soup) is so easy! Made into a creamy soup with coconut milk, ginger, garlic, and malunggay.
ingredients: 2 cups dry monggo beans, mung beans, or green lentils
1 cup coconut milk (I used the canned kind)
1 bunch chopped or pulled malunggay leaves (or spinach)
fields.title: Monggo Beans with Malunggay (or Mung Bean Soup)

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: Date Night Mushroom Fettuccine - elegant and luscious and FIVE INGREDIENT EASY.
ingredients: 1/2 cup Land O Lakes® Butter, divided
2 cloves fresh minced garlic, or a pinch of garlic salt
16 ounces fresh sliced mushrooms (more if you love mushrooms!)
fields.title: Date Night Mushroom Fettuccine

fields.author: Bjork Ostrom
fields.description: Heyo! Bjork here checking in for the monthly traffic and income report here on Pinch of Yum. Every month Lindsay let’s me have a lil’ cameo on Pinch of
fields.title: November Traffic and Income Report

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: These Oreo fudge ice cream bars have a deliciously thick crust of crushed Oreo cookies, fudge, and creamy peanut butter ice cream. A major crowd pleaser!
ingredients: 1 lb. (1 package) Double Stuf Oreo cookies
1/2 gallon ice cream: choose a flavor you like to make it interesting! Swirled with caramel, stuffed with peanut butter cups, etc.
fields.title: Oreo Fudge Ice Cream Bars

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: There's something I haven't been telling you. For the last 60 days, Bjork and I have taken on the challenge to live without refined sugar. And it is
fields.title: Our Life Without Sugar

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: The simplicity of these Parmesan baked eggs is what makes them so amazing! Butter, shallot, herbs, garlic, eggs, and cream.
fields.title: <span class="fn">Parmesan Baked Eggs

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: You don't have to be vegan or gluten free to love these all-natural 5 ingredient peanut butter cookie dough balls! The perfect snack.
ingredients: 1/4 cup peanut butter (I used chunky natural)
fields.title: Peanut Butter Cookie Dough Balls

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: It's nearly springtime and we're making this beautiful Pistachio Loaf! Grab your baking essentials – like butter, eggs, and sugar – plus a few extras, like pistachios and coconut flour, and get baking!
ingredients: 1 cup roasted salted shelled pistachios (I buy these ones*)
1/2 cup cold unsalted butter, cut into chunks
1/4 cup milk (oat milk, whole milk, whatever)
fields.title: Pistachio Loaf

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: Queso Chicken Chili! Creamy, spicy, and so easy. Made with roasted corn, jalapeño, and creamy Pepper Jack cheese. Super easy dinner!
ingredients: 1 14 ounce can corn, rinsed and drained
1 jalapeño pepper, minced (without ribs and seeds)
1 14 ounce can black beans, rinsed and drained
blue corn tortilla chips for yummy dippin’
fields.title: Queso Chicken Chili with Roasted Corn and Jalapeño

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: These pumpkin bars are moist and so addicting when topped with this old-fashioned caramel frosting. Always a crowd-pleaser!
fields.title: <span class="fn">Pumpkin Bars with Old-Fashioned Caramel Frosting

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: Pumpkin Bites with Maple Glaze are a MUST for pumpkin lovers! made with easy ingredients like oats, pumpkin, maple syrup, and olive oil.
fields.title: Pumpkin Bites with Maple Glaze

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: This Rainbow Chicken Salad is topped with tender chicken, plump grapes and berries, crisp lettuce, tangy feta cheese, crunchy almonds, and the real star - almond honey mustard dressing! Perfect for lunch or dinner!
ingredients: 8 ounces boneless, skinless chicken breasts (mine were cut into smaller, thinner pieces which made the sautéing a bit easier)
fields.title: Rainbow Chicken Salad with Almond Honey Mustard Dressing

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: Rainbow Veggie Bowls with Jalapeño Ranch - layers of veggies, nuts, grains, beans, and homemade dressing. So good! A new favorite.
ingredients: 1 1/2 cups corn kernels cut off the cob
nuts or seeds (I used crushed almonds)
fields.title: Rainbow Veggie Bowls with Jalapeño Ranch

fields.author: Lindsay Ostrom
fields.description: This is a recipe for Raisin Bran Muffins from my very best friend. Perfect hot out of the oven with melted butter and honey.
ingredients: 1/2 cup neutral oil, like vegetable oil
2 cups buttermilk (sub 1 1/2 cups milk and 1/2 cup plain yogurt)
fields.title: <span class="fn">Raisin Bran Muffins

fields.description: A little thing about me: I ♡ FOOD. I used to be a teacher, and now making food and writing about it online is my full-time job. I love talking with people about food, and I'm so glad you're here. Did you make a recipe? Tag @pinchofyum on Instagram so we can find you!

fields.title: Lindsay Ostrom

fields.description: Learn to create and share delicious dessert, cake, cookie, cupcake and drink recipes in your home from-scratch with easy-to-find ingredients AND little effort. Food never tasted so good!
fields.title: Sweet, Simple, & From-Scratch Dessert Recipes: Sugar Spun Run

fields.description: This Alfredo sauce recipe is so easy and quick to make--just 25 minutes total! It's incredibly creamy and packed with flavor. Use it for pasta, pizza, and more!
ingredients: 1  shallot (finely minced (slightly less than ¼ cup))
½ teaspoon salt (plus more to taste)
¼ teaspoon freshly ground black pepper
fields.title: Alfredo Sauce Recipe

fields.description: Pillowy soft Amish cinnamon rolls have a sneaky secret ingredient (that's probably already in your kitchen!) that makes them unbelievably plush and melt in your mouth tender.  Recipe includes a how-to video!
ingredients: 1 cup mashed russet potato ((unseasoned/unsalted, room temperature or slightly warm – see note!))
6 Tablespoons unsalted butter (softened and cut into Tablespoon-sized pieces)
4 cups bread flour + additional as needed
½ cup light brown sugar (firmly packed)
fields.title: Amish Cinnamon Rolls

fields.description: With its perfectly spiced, rich apple flavor and no peeling required, you'll be spreading this Apple Butter on everything from scones to scrapple. My recipe is incredibly easy thanks to the help of a slow cooker. Be sure to check out the how-to video!
ingredients: 5.5 lbs soft, sweet apples (see note 1) (Cored and chopped into small pieces, about ¼")
1  vanilla bean ((may substitute 1 ½ teaspoons vanilla extract))
fields.title: The Best Apple Butter Recipe (No Peeling!)

fields.description: A recipe for Apple Slab Pie! Please see video at the bottom of the recipe card.You will need a food processor and a jelly roll pan for this recipe.
ingredients: 9 Tablespoons cold unsalted butter (cut into 15 pieces)
3 lbs Granny Smith apples (peeled, cored, and diced into ¼" pieces)
¼ cup light brown sugar (tightly packed)
½ cup light brown sugar (tightly packed)
6 Tbsp cold unsalted butter (cut into 12 pieces)
fields.title: Apple Slab Pie

fields.description: With a concentrated apple reduction and spiced sugar coating, this apple cider donut recipe packs all the flavors of fall in one tender bite. These donuts come together easily with just a few ingredients--no yeast or frying required!Watch the how-to video for step-by-step instructions.
ingredients: ⅛ teaspoon allspice (optional, but brings out the apple cider flavor!)
fields.title: Apple Cider Donuts

fields.description: A twist on the classic dish, Bacon Mac and Cheese is the ultimate comfort food. This recipe feeds a crowd and comes together in just over 30 minutes, making it the perfect side dish for game days, potlucks, and holiday parties. Watch the how-to video for step-by-step instructions!
ingredients: 8 strips thick-cut bacon (uncooked and cut into pieces)
2 Tablespoons butter (salted or unsalted is fine)
3 cups whole milk (see note for different types of milk)
2 cups freshly shredded sharp cheddar cheese (see note)
½ cup freshly shredded gouda cheese
fields.title: Bacon Mac and Cheese

fields.description: An easy recipe for homemade Baked Donuts! There's no yeast, no waiting for the dough to rise, just a simple recipe that can be whipped up in under 30 minutes.Be sure to check out the how-to video, too!
ingredients: 3 Tablespoons unsalted butter (melted and slightly cooled)
fields.title: Baked Donuts

fields.description: My baked mac and cheese is cheesy, creamy, absolutely loaded with flavor and topped with a buttery-crisp toasted panko topping. It's a classic that's somehow unrivaled in flavor. Recipe includes a video tutorial.
ingredients: 3 cups whole milk  (or half and half (see note))
2 cups shredded sharp cheddar cheese (see note)
fields.title: (The Best!) Baked Mac and Cheese Recipe

fields.description: My homemade baked ziti is made with a robustly flavored, from-scratch tomato sauce, Italian sausage, and melty, bubbly cheese. It's comfort food at its finest! Recipe includes a how-to video!
ingredients: 2 Tablespoons + 2 teaspoons extra virgin olive oil (divided)
1 lb Italian sausage (I’ve used Sweet Italian and Mild)
14 oz can fire roasted diced tomatoes (undrained)
¼ cup thinly sliced fresh basil (loosely packed)
fields.title: Baked Ziti

fields.description: Banana brownies are a great way to use up leftover bananas (especially when you're sick of banana bread!). My recipe uses just one bowl and takes only 15 minutes to prep.
ingredients: ½ cup mashed banana (about 1 large banana)
fields.title: Banana Brownies

fields.description: This banana coffee cake tastes like a banana bread and coffee cake hybrid! It's soft, moist, and SO flavorful with a pecan and chocolate chip infused streusel topping.
ingredients: ½ cup light brown sugar (firmly packed)
⅓ cup chopped pecans or walnuts (optional)
¼ cup light brown sugar (firmly packed )
1 cup mashed overripe banana ((about 2-3 bananas for me))
fields.title: Banana Coffee Cake

fields.description: Have brown bananas? Skip the bread and make banana cookies! My recipe is carefully crafted to have a chewy (not cakey!) texture and rich banana flavor.Recipe includes a how-to video!
ingredients: ⅔ cup well-mashed (very-ripe bananas (this is typically 1 ½ bananas for me))
1 cup unsalted butter (melted and cooled until no longer warm to the touch)
1 ½ cups chocolate chips (use either milk chocolate or semisweet, or a blend of the two! )
fields.title: Banana Cookies

fields.description: My Banana Cream Pie recipe is made with a creamy vanilla pudding, flavored with a thick layer of bananas, served on a crisp vanilla wafer crust and topped off with a fluffy crown of homemade whipped cream!Be sure to check out the how-to VIDEO just below the recipe!
ingredients: ¼ cup lemon or lime juice
fields.title: Banana Cream Pie Recipe

fields.description: My homemade banana pudding recipe knocks the socks off of any boxed pudding you'll ever try! With a from-scratch banana pudding and even the option to make your own homemade vanilla wafers. Recipe includes a how-to video tutorial!
ingredients: 3 Tablespoons lemon juice (lime juice may be substituted)
45  vanilla wafers (divided (click the link to make your own homemade vanilla wafers))
fields.title: Homemade Banana Pudding (From Scratch!)

fields.description: How to make Banana Nut Muffins with browned butter! These are gourmet, better-than-bakery muffins and I think you'll love them!Instructional how-to VIDEO included below the recipe!
ingredients: 1 ½ cups mashed ripe or over-ripe bananas* ((this is typically 3 large bananas for me))
½ cup light brown sugar (tightly packed )
1 ¼ cups chopped pecans or walnuts (divided)
fields.title: Banana Nut Muffins

fields.description: BBQ chicken meatballs are the perfect weeknight dinner or game day appetizer. Ready in under 30 minutes and oh so easy to make! Recipe includes a how-to video!
fields.title: BBQ Chicken Meatballs

fields.description: My beef ragu recipe cooks for hours until it is incredibly tender and flavorful. Serve it with pappardelle pasta for a hearty and impressive dinner! Recipe includes a how-to video!
ingredients: 3 lb chuck roast (patted dry and cut into fist-sized pieces )
⅓ cup red wine vinegar (may substitute a dry red wine)
2 cups beef broth (may substitute chicken broth or chicken stock)
2-3  fresh thyme springs (or 1 teaspoon dried thyme)
12 oz-1 lb Pappardelle or preferred pasta (for serving )
fields.title: Beef Ragu

fields.description: Loaded with fresh (or frozen!) berries of your choosing, this berry crisp is incredibly simple and always a hit! My recipe takes just 15 minutes to prepare and can be made several days in advance. Recipe includes a how-to video!
ingredients: 7 cups fresh or frozen mixed berries (see note )
fields.title: Berry Crisp

fields.description: A moist, flavorful banana bread recipe that can be prepped and in the oven in under 20 minutes, no mixer needed. Be sure to check out the how-to video at the bottom of the recipe!
ingredients: 1 ½ cups well-mashed overripe bananas (this is usually 3 large ripe bananas for me (355ml))
¼ cup avocado, canola or vegetable oil
⅔ cup light or dark brown sugar (firmly packed)
2 large eggs (lightly beaten, room temperature preferred)
1 ¼ cups chocolate chips or chopped nuts² (optional)
¼ cup coarse or granulated sugar for sprinkling (optional)
fields.title: The BEST Banana Bread

fields.description: Soft, moist, and perfectly spiced, my carrot cake recipe has been a reader favorite for years! This cake is beginner friendly and surprisingly simple to make. Top it off with my cream cheese frosting (recipe included below) for what will be truly the best carrot cake of your life!Be sure to check out the how-to video!
ingredients: 1 cup light or dark brown sugar¹ (firmly packed)
1 cup cooking oil (use canola, avocado, or vegetable oil )

nutrition.servingSize: 1 slice (calories calculated with frosting but without optional nuts)

fields.title: The Best Carrot Cake Recipe

fields.description: This is the BEST Chili Recipe! Made with bacon (and the option to omit if necessary) and ground beef and  simmered on the stove for just 30 minutes, this is my family's go-to cold weather comfort food. It's even better when paired with a side of buttermilk cornbread!
ingredients: 1 lb ground beef ((455g) (I use 90% but any will work))
15 oz can dark red kidney beans (lightly rinsed and drained (425g))
15 oz can black beans (lightly rinsed and drained (425))
14.5 oz can diced fire roasted tomatoes (undrained (411g))
7- oz can fire roasted green chilis ((198g))
Preferred toppings (particularly sour cream, shredded cheddar cheese, and corn chips)
fields.title: The Best Chili Recipe (Award Winning!)

fields.description: My traditional chocolate mousse is a silky, airy dessert sure to impress any guest. While it may look fancy, this recipe takes only 15 minutes to prep with a few pantry staples. Recipe includes a how-to video tutorial!RAW EGG NOTE: This recipe is made the traditional French way, meaning it's authentic and is made using raw eggs. Because of this, it may not be recommended for pregnant women, children, or people with compromised immune systems.
ingredients: Pinch of espresso powder (about ⅛ teaspoon, optional)
½ cup heavy cream (plus additional for whipped cream topping, indicated below )
fields.title: Perfect Chocolate Mousse

fields.description: This is the smoothest, most flavorful, BEST queso recipe you'll find! It takes just 15 minutes from start to finish and uses only one pot for easy clean up. Recipe includes a how-to video!
ingredients: ⅓ cup finely diced white onion
4 oz can fire roasted diced green chilis (drained )
¼ cup diced roma tomato or canned petite diced tomatoes (juices drained )
Dash of cayenne pepper (for a spicier queso, optional)
¼ teaspoon table salt (plus additional to taste as needed)
8 oz freshly grated sharp cheddar cheese (see note )
fields.title: The Best Queso Recipe

fields.description: A true classic, my Pound Cake recipe is simple (only six ingredients) and satisfying! This cake is so moist and buttery, and it pairs beautifully with fresh fruit. This recipe includes a how-to video--keep scrolling to watch!
ingredients: 6 large egg yolks¹ ((these 6 egg yolks are in addition to the 6 whole eggs listed above))
fields.title: The Perfect Pound Cake Recipe

fields.description: You've officially found the BEST yellow cake recipe on the internet! My version is incredibly moist and SO easy with just one bowl (and no mixer!). Recipe includes a how-to video!
ingredients: 12 Tablespoons unsalted butter, melted and cooled until no longer warm to the touch (see note )
fields.title: Yellow Cake Recipe

fields.description: These soft birthday cake cookies are topped with a perfectly sweet cream cheese frosting and birthday cake crumbs. My recipe is 100% from-scratch, lots of fun to make, and takes just 45 minutes to prep!Recipe includes a how-to video!
ingredients: ½ teaspoon clear vanilla extract (may substitute regular vanilla extract)
4 oz cream cheese (softened (use full-fat “brick-style” cream cheese) )
½ teaspoon clear vanilla extract (may substitute regular vanilla extract)
fields.title: Birthday Cake Cookies

fields.description: The BEST classic Birthday Cake Recipe. A soft and fluffy vanilla yellow cake loaded with colorful sprinkles and frosted with chocolate cream cheese frosting.Make sure to check out the how-to VIDEO at the bottom of the recipe!
ingredients: 4 cups all-purpose flour ((may substitute 500g cake flour))
fields.title: Birthday Cake Recipe

fields.description: Kick off your next birthday with a pretty little slice of birthday crumb cake! My recipe features two layers of sprinkle-infused streusel between moist, soft vanilla cake. Includes a how-to video!
fields.title: Birthday Crumb Cake

fields.description: Blizzard Cookies from SugarSpunRun.com
ingredients: 4 oz cream cheese (softened to room temperature)
1 ½ cups premium white chocolate chips
fields.title: Blizzard Cookies

fields.description: Blueberry Cake is a great way to use up summer berries! This cake is soft, moist, and dense (without being at all dry!) and reminds me of a big fluffy blueberry muffin! Top everything off with a simple lemon glaze and enjoy!
ingredients: ½ cup unsalted butter (softened to room temperature )
8 oz cream cheese (softened to room temperature)
1 ½ cups fresh or frozen blueberries
fields.title: Blueberry Cake

fields.description: This creamy, brilliantly flavored blueberry cheesecake is so simple to make with NO water bath! My recipe has blueberries in both the cake and the topping for a bright, yet balanced berry flavor. Recipe includes a how-to video!
ingredients: 24 oz cream cheese softened (use full-fat brick style cream cheese, not the spreadable kind in the tub  )
1 Tablespoon butter (salted or unsalted is fine)
fields.title: Blueberry Cheesecake

fields.description: If you like classic blueberry muffins you'll love blueberry cream cheese muffins that are filled with rich cream cheese and sweet streusel on top! Recipe includes a how-to video!
ingredients: ¼ cup vegetable oil (you may substitute canola oil or other neutral cooking oil)
1  large egg + 1 large egg white (room temperature preferred)
2 Tablespoons butter ((melted but not too hot))
fields.title: Blueberry Cream Cheese Muffins

fields.description: This simple, 6-ingredient blueberry frosting is naturally colored and flavored and can be prepared with either fresh or frozen berries. It's vibrant, flavorful, and comes together easily! Recipe includes a how-to video!
fields.title: Blueberry Frosting

fields.description: My blueberry lemonade uses a fresh or frozen blueberry simple syrup for a stunning flavor and color. It's refreshing and perfect for summer, and it tastes great spiked too! Recipe includes a how-to video!
ingredients: 1 cup lemon juice – fresh-squeezed is best!
fields.title: Blueberry Lemonade

fields.description: Meet your new favorite blueberry muffin recipe. This version yields tender, fluffy muffins loaded with sweet blueberries and sprinkled with a sparkly dusting of sugar. Quick, easy, and guaranteed to impress. Recipe includes a how-to video!
ingredients: ¼ cup avocado oil or vegetable oil or canola oil ((may substitute vegetable oil))
Coarse sugar for sprinkling (optional (may just use regular granulated sugar or omit entirely).)
fields.title: The Best Blueberry Muffin Recipe

fields.description: How to make perfect blueberry pancakes completely from scratch.
ingredients: 4 Tablespoons unsalted butter melted and cooled for several minutes
2 large eggs lightly beaten (room temperature preferred)
1 ½ cups fresh or frozen blueberries (see notes in post about using frozen blueberries)
fields.title: Blueberry Pancakes

fields.description: These homemade Boston cream donuts are surprisingly easy to make and taste SO much better than the ones you get from the coffee shop. You'll fill them with silky smooth vanilla custard and dip them in a rich chocolate glaze before they're ready to be devoured. Recipe includes a how-to video!
ingredients: 1  batch homemade pastry cream (click link for recipe)
3 ½ cups all-purpose flour (divided, plus additional as needed )
3 oz chopped chocolate (or ½ cup semisweet chocolate chips )
fields.title: Homemade Boston Cream Donuts

fields.description: My classic bread pudding recipe is easy and oh so cozy. Customize it with dried fruit, nuts, or chocolate, or keep it simple and serve with the buttery sauce. Recipe includes a how-to video!
ingredients: 16 oz stale Challah bread (use day-old, slightly stale bread for best results (about 10 cups cubed bread))
½ cup light brown sugar (firmly packed)
2 Tablespoons salted or unsalted butter (cold, cut into pea sized pieces)
¼ cup light brown sugar (firmly packed)
fields.title: Bread Pudding

fields.description: Made with your favorite veggies and protein, this breakfast casserole is an easy option for meal prepping or feeding a crowd. You can even make it in advance! Recipe includes a how-to video!
fields.title: Breakfast Casserole

fields.description: Elevate your breakfast game with this brioche French toast! This recipe feels and tastes fancy, but it's just as easy as regular French toast. Don't miss my secret ingredient for the BEST flavor!
ingredients: 7 slices brioche bread (sliced to be 1” thick)
Additional butter (maple syrup, or preferred toppings)
fields.title: Brioche French Toast

fields.description: While other recipes take shortcuts, my brookie cookies combine real brownie batter with chocolate chip cookie dough. The result is a classic pairing that tastes just as incredible as it looks! Recipe includes a how-to video!
ingredients: 10 oz semisweet chocolate baking bar (chopped (or 10 oz/1 ⅔ semisweet chocolate chips))
⅓ cup unsalted butter (cut into pieces)
⅔ cup mini semisweet chocolate chips ((optional))
1 cup unsalted butter (softened (but preferably with a slight chill still))
1 cup light brown sugar ((or a blend of light and dark, preferred))
1 teaspoon table salt ((or fine sea salt))
fields.title: Brookie Cookies

fields.description: Brookies are a fun combination of chocolate chip cookie bars and brownies, all swirled together in one pan! They're loaded with chocolate chips and are perfectly chewy and fudgy. Recipe includes a how-to video.
ingredients: ¾ cup unsalted butter (melted and cooled at least 10-15 minutes (see note))
⅔ cup tightly packed brown sugar (light or dark)
¾ cup unsalted butter (cut into Tbsp-sized pieces)
2  large eggs + 1 egg yolk (room temperature preferred)
fields.title: Brookies

fields.description: These large, bakery-style hazelnut cookies are made with browned butter, crunchy hazelnuts, plenty of chocolate, and a sprinkle of sea salt. They are the ultimate chocolate chip cookies!
